664→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"edb2a5b9-962a-43da-80eb-9f8f7e8c3722","uuid":"ffec844e-5647-4dfe-8d7f-9f5a799f048a","timestamp":"2026-03-24T06:03:18.043Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/page.tsx","content":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  requires_approval: number;\n  platform_preference: string;\n  member_count: number;\n  author_name: string;\n  created_at: string;\n}\n\nexport default function HomePage() {\n  const [listings, setListings] = useState<Listing[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n\n  // Search & filter state\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"\");\n  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n  const [startDateFrom, setStartDateFrom] = useState(\"\");\n  const [sort, setSort] = useState(\"newest\");\n  const [filtersOpen, setFiltersOpen] = useState(false);\n\n  // Pagination state\n  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\n  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(1);\n  const [totalResults, setTotalResults] = useState(0);\n\n  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n\n  const fetchListings = useCallback(\n    (query: string, format: string, sortBy: string, pace?: string, dateFrom?: string, pageNum?: number) => {\n      setLoading(true);\n      const params = new URLSearchParams();\n      if (query) params.set(\"q\", query);\n      if (format) params.set(\"meeting_format\", format);\n      if (pace) params.set(\"reading_pace\", pace);\n      if (dateFrom) params.set(\"start_date_from\", dateFrom);\n      if (sortBy) params.set(\"sort\", sortBy);\n      if (pageNum && pageNum > 1) params.set(\"page\", String(pageNum));\n\n      const qs = params.toString();\n      fetch(`/api/listings${qs ? `?${qs}` : \"\"}`)\n        .then((r) => {\n          if (!r.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to load listings\");\n          return r.json();\n        })\n        .then((data) => {\n          setListings(data.listings || []);\n          if (data.pagination) {\n            setTotalPages(data.pagination.totalPages || 1);\n            setTotalResults(data.pagination.total || 0);\n          }\n          setError(null);\n          setLoading(false);\n        })\n        .catch((err) => {\n          setError(err.message || \"Could not load listings. Please try again.\");\n          setLoading(false);\n        });\n    },\n    []\n  );\n\n  // Initial fetch\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n  }, [fetchListings]);\n\n  // Debounced search\n  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSearchQuery(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n      fetchListings(value, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n    }, 400);\n  };\n\n  // Immediate filter changes\n  const handleFormatChange = (value: string) => {\n    setMeetingFormat(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, value, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n  };\n\n  const handlePaceChange = (value: string) => {\n    setReadingPace(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, value, startDateFrom, 1);\n  };\n\n  const handleStartDateFromChange = (value: string) => {\n    setStartDateFrom(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, value, 1);\n  };\n\n  const handleSortChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSort(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, value, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n  };\n\n  const handlePageChange = (newPage: number) => {\n    setPage(newPage);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, newPage);\n    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: \"smooth\" });\n  };\n\n  const clearFilters = () => {\n    setSearchQuery(\"\");\n    setMeetingFormat(\"\");\n    setReadingPace(\"\");\n    setStartDateFrom(\"\");\n    setSort(\"newest\");\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n  };\n\n  const hasActiveFilters = searchQuery || meetingFormat || readingPace || startDateFrom || sort !== \"newest\";\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div className=\"text-center mb-6 sm:mb-8 mt-2 sm:mt-4\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-4xl mb-2 sm:mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>\n          Find your reading companion\n        </h1>\n        <p\n          className=\"text-sm sm:text-lg max-w-xl mx-auto\"\n          style={{\n            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          Browse open reading groups, join one that matches your pace, and\n          connect on Telegram to read together.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Search & Filter Bar */}\n      <div className=\"mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex gap-3 items-center\">\n          <div className=\"flex-1 relative\">\n            <input\n              type=\"text\"\n              placeholder=\"Search by book title or author...\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"input-field\"\n              style={{ paddingLeft: \"2.5rem\" }}\n            />\n            <svg\n              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n              style={{\n                position: \"absolute\",\n                left: \"0.75rem\",\n                top: \"50%\",\n                transform: \"translateY(-50%)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                width: \"1.125rem\",\n                height: \"1.125rem\",\n                pointerEvents: \"none\",\n              }}\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n            >\n              <circle cx={11} cy={11} r={8} />\n              <line x1={21} y1={21} x2={16.65} y2={16.65} />\n            </svg>\n          </div>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => setFiltersOpen(!filtersOpen)}\n            className=\"btn-secondary\"\n            aria-expanded={filtersOpen}\n            aria-controls=\"filter-panel\"\n            style={{\n              display: \"flex\",\n              alignItems: \"center\",\n              gap: \"0.375rem\",\n              whiteSpace: \"nowrap\",\n              position: \"relative\",\n            }}\n          >\n            <svg\n              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n              width=\"16\"\n              height=\"16\"\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n            >\n              <line x1={4} y1={6} x2={20} y2={6} />\n              <line x1={7} y1={12} x2={17} y2={12} />\n              <line x1={10} y1={18} x2={14} y2={18} />\n            </svg>\n            Filters\n            {hasActiveFilters && (\n              <span\n                aria-hidden=\"true\"\n                style={{\n                  width: \"0.5rem\",\n                  height: \"0.5rem\",\n                  borderRadius: \"50%\",\n                  backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                  position: \"absolute\",\n                  top: \"0.375rem\",\n                  right: \"0.375rem\",\n                }}\n              />\n            )}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Filter panel */}\n        {filtersOpen && (\n          <div\n            id=\"filter-panel\"\n            className=\"card mt-3\"\n            style={{ padding: \"1rem 1.25rem\" }}\n          >\n            <div\n              className=\"grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3 sm:gap-4 items-end\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Meeting format\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={meetingFormat}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleFormatChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"\">All formats</option>\n                  <option value=\"voice\">Voice calls</option>\n                  <option value=\"text\">Text chat</option>\n                  <option value=\"mixed\">Mixed</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              <div>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Reading pace\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={readingPace}\n                  onChange={(e) => handlePaceChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"\">All paces</option>\n                  <option value=\"chapter\">Chapter-based</option>\n                  <option value=\"pages\">Pages-based</option>\n                  <option value=\"week\">Weekly</option>\n                  <option value=\"day\">Daily</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              <div>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Starting from\n                </label>\n                <input\n                  type=\"date\"\n                  value={startDateFrom}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleStartDateFromChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                />\n              </div>\n\n              <div>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Sort by\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={sort}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleSortChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"newest\">Newest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"oldest\">Oldest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"start_date\">Start date (soonest)</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              {hasActiveFilters && (\n                <button\n                  onClick={clearFilters}\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n                    fontWeight: 600,\n                    cursor: \"pointer\",\n                    background: \"none\",\n                    border: \"none\",\n                    padding: \"0.5rem 0\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Clear all\n                </button>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Results */}\n      {loading ? (\n        <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n          {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => (\n            <div key={i} className=\"card flex gap-4\">\n              <div\n                className=\"skeleton\"\n                style={{ width: \"4rem\", height: \"6rem\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n              />\n              <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                <div\n                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-heading\"\n                  style={{ width: `${60 - i * 5}%` }}\n                />\n                <div\n                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-text\"\n                  style={{ width: `${45 - i * 5}%` }}\n                />\n                <div className=\"flex gap-2 mt-2\">\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"5rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"4rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"5.5rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      ) : error ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          <svg\n            width=\"40\"\n            height=\"40\"\n            viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n            fill=\"none\"\n            stroke=\"var(--color-error)\"\n            strokeWidth={1.5}\n            style={{ margin: \"0 auto 0.75rem\" }}\n          >\n            <circle cx={12} cy={12} r={10} />\n            <line x1={12} y1={8} x2={12} y2={12} />\n            <line x1={12} y1={16} x2={12.01} y2={16} />\n          </svg>\n          <p\n            className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n            style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            {error}\n          </p>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom)}\n            className=\"btn-primary\"\n            style={{ marginTop: \"0.75rem\" }}\n          >\n            Try again\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      ) : listings.length === 0 ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          {hasActiveFilters ? (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No matching reading groups\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Try adjusting your search or filters to find more groups.\n              </p>\n              <button onClick={clearFilters} className=\"btn-secondary\">\n                Clear filters\n              </button>\n            </>\n          ) : (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No reading groups yet\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Be the first to create a reading group and find your book\n                companions.\n              </p>\n              <Link href=\"/listings/create\" className=\"btn-primary\">\n                Create the first listing\n              </Link>\n            </>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      ) : (\n        <>\n          <p\n            className=\"mb-3 text-sm\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            {totalResults} open group{totalResults !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}\n            {hasActiveFilters ? \" found\" : \"\"}\n            {totalPages > 1 ? ` · Page ${page} of ${totalPages}` : \"\"}\n          </p>\n          <div className=\"grid gap-4\" role=\"list\" aria-label=\"Reading groups\">\n            {listings.map((listing) => (\n              <Link\n                key={listing.id}\n                href={`/listings/${listing.id}`}\n                className=\"card hover:shadow-md transition-shadow flex gap-4\"\n                role=\"listitem\"\n              >\n                <BookCover\n                  src={listing.book_cover_url}\n                  alt={listing.book_title}\n                  width={64}\n                  height={96}\n                  className=\"w-16 h-24 object-cover rounded\"\n                  style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n                />\n\n                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                  <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold truncate\">\n                    {listing.book_title}\n                  </h3>\n                  <p\n                    className=\"text-sm mb-2 truncate\"\n                    style={{\n                      color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    }}\n                  >\n                    by {listing.book_author} · posted by {listing.author_name}\n                  </p>\n\n                  <div\n                    className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2\"\n                    style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                  >\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {listing.reading_pace}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Starts{\" \"}\n                      {new Date(listing.start_date).toLocaleDateString(\n                        \"en-US\",\n                        {\n                          month: \"short\",\n                          day: \"numeric\",\n                        }\n                      )}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {listing.member_count}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n                    </span>\n                    {listing.requires_approval ? (\n                      <span\n                        className=\"badge\"\n                        style={{\n                          backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.08)\",\n                          color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        Approval required\n                      </span>\n                    ) : null}\n                    {listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? (\n                      <span\n                        className=\"badge\"\n                        style={{\n                          backgroundColor: \"rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.08)\",\n const { id } = useParams();\n     9→  const router = useRouter();\n    10→  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n    11→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n    12→  const [fetching, setFetching] = useState(true);\n    13→\n    14→  const [bookTitle, setBookTitle] = useState(\"\");\n    15→  const [bookAuthor, setBookAuthor] = useState(\"\");\n    16→  const client\";\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport Image from \"next/image\";\n\nexport default function EditListingPage() {\n  const { id } = useParams();\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [fetching, setFetching] = useState(true);\n\n  const [bookTitle, setBookTitle] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookAuthor, setBookAuthor] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookCoverUrl, setBookCoverUrl] = useState(\"\");\n  const [language, setLanguage] = useState(\"English\");\n  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(\"\");\n  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"text\");\n  const [maxGroupSize, setMaxGroupSize] = useState(\"4\");\n  const [requiresApproval, setRequiresApproval] = useState(false);\n  const [platformPreference, setPlatformPreference] = useState(\"telegram\");\n  const [memberCount, setMemberCount] = useState(1);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    async function fetchListing() {\n      try {\n        const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n        const data = await res.json();\n        if (res.ok && data.listing) {\n          const l = data.listing;\n          if (!l.isAuthor) {\n            router.push(`/listings/${id}`);\n            return;\n          }\n          // Cannot edit if platform link shared\n          if (l.telegram_link || l.discord_link) {\n            router.push(`/listings/${id}`);\n            return;\n          }\n          setBookTitle(l.book_title);\n          setBookAuthor(l.book_author);\n          setBookCoverUrl(l.book_cover_url || \"\");\n          setLanguage(l.language || \"English\");\n          setReadingPace(l.reading_pace || \"\");\n          setStartDate(l.start_date || \"\");\n          setMeetingFormat(l.meeting_format || \"text\");\n          setMaxGroupSize(String(l.max_group_size || 4));\n          setRequiresApproval(!!l.requires_approval);\n          setPlatformPreference(l.platform_preference || \"telegram\");\n          setMemberCount(l.memberCount || 1);\n        } else if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n        } else {\n          setError(\"Listing not found\");\n        }\n      } catch {\n        setError(\"Failed to load listing\");\n      } finally {\n        setFetching(false);\n      }\n    }\n    fetchListing();\n  }, [id, router]);\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setError(\"\");\n    setLoading(true);\n\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`, {\n        method: \"PATCH\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          language,\n          readingPace,\n          startDate,\n          meetingFormat,\n          maxGroupSize,\n          requiresApproval,\n          platformPreference,\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const data = await res.json();\n\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error || \"Failed to update listing\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      router.push(`/listings/${id}`);\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Something went wrong. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  if (fetching) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"max-w-lg mx-auto\">\n        <div className=\"animate-pulse space-y-4\">\n          <div className=\"h-8 bg-gray-200 rounded w-2/3\" />\n          <div className=\"h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded w-1/2\" />\n          <div className=\"h-40 bg-gray-200 rounded\" />\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Filter group size options: only allow sizes >= current member count\n  const groupSizeOptions = [2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 10, 15, 20].filter(\n    (n) => n >= memberCount\n  );\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-lg mx-auto\">\n      <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-3xl mb-2\">Edit reading group</h1>\n      <p\n        className=\"mb-6 sm:mb-8\"\n        style={{\n          color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n          fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n        }}\n      >\n        Update your group settings. Book title and author cannot be changed.\n      </p>\n\n      {error && (\n        <div\n          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n          role=\"alert\"\n        >\n          {error}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Book info (read-only) */}\n      <div\n        className=\"mb-6 flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-lg\"\n        style={{\n          backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.06)\",\n          border: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\",\n        }}\n      >\n        {bookCoverUrl && (\n          <Image\n            src={bookCoverUrl}\n            alt={`Cover of ${bookTitle}`}\n            width={48}\n            height={68}\n            className=\"w-12 h-17 object-cover rounded\"\n          />\n        )}\n        <div>\n          <div\n            className=\"text-sm font-semibold\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            {bookTitle}\n          </div>\n          <div\n            className=\"text-xs\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            by {bookAuthor}\n          </div>\n          <div\n            className=\"text-xs mt-1\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              fontStyle: \"italic\",\n            }}\n          >\n            Book cannot be changed\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"space-y-5\">\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Discussion language\n          </label>\n          <select\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={language}\n            onChange={(e) => setLanguage(e.target.value)}\n          >\n            <option>English</option>\n            <option>Spanish</option>\n            <option>French</option>\n            <option>German</option>\n            <option>Russian</option>\n            <option>Portuguese</option>\n            <option>Italian</option>\n            <option>Japanese</option>\n            <option>Chinese</option>\n            <option>Korean</option>\n            <option>Other</option>\n          </select>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Reading pace\n          </label>\n          <input\n            type=\"text\"\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={readingPace}\n            onChange={(e) => setReadingPace(e.target.value)}\n            required\n            placeholder='e.g. \"1 chapter per week\" or \"50 pages per day\"'\n          />\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Start date\n          </label>\n          <input\n            type=\"date\"\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={startDate}\n            onChange={(e) => setStartDate(e.target.value)}\n            required\n          />\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Meeting format\n          </label>\n          <div className=\"flex gap-3\" role=\"radiogroup\" aria-label=\"Meeting format\">\n            {[\n              { value: \"text\", label: \"Text chat\" },\n              { value: \"voice\", label: \"Voice calls\" },\n              { value: \"mixed\", label: \"Mixed\" },\n            ].map((opt) => (\n              <button\n                key={opt.value}\n                type=\"button\"\n                role=\"radio\"\n                aria-checked={meetingFormat === opt.value}\n                onClick={() => setMeetingFormat(opt.value)}\n                className=\"flex-1 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold transition-colors cursor-pointer\"\n                style={{\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  backgroundColor:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"transparent\",\n                  color:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"white\"\n                      : \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  border:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"1.5px solid var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                }}\n              >\n                {opt.label}\n              </button>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Maximum group size\n          </label>\n          {memberCount > 1 && (\n            <p\n              className=\"text-xs mb-1\"\n              style={{\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Cannot be less than current member count ({memberCount})\n            </p>\n          )}\n          <select\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={maxGroupSize}\n            onChange={(e) => setMaxGroupSize(e.target.value)}\n          >\n            {groupSizeOptions.map((n) => (\n              <option key={n} value={n}>\n                {n} readers\n              </option>\n            ))}\n          </select>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Chat platform\n          </label>\n          <p\n            className=\"text-xs mb-2\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            Where your group will connect once it&apos;s full\n          </p>\n          <div className=\"flex gap-3\" role=\"radiogroup\" aria-label=\"Chat platform\">\n            {[\n              { value: \"telegram\", label: \"Telegram\", icon: (\n                <svg width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0 0 12-12A12 12 0 0 0 12 0a12 12 0 0 0-.056 0zm4.962 7.224c.1-.002.321.023.465.14a.506.506 0 0 1 .171.325c.016.093.036.306.02.472-.18 1.898-.962 6.502-1.36 8.627-.168.9-.499 1.201-.82 1.14-5.061 3.345-.479.33-.913.49-1.302.48-.428-.008-1.252-.241-1.865-.44-.752-.245-1.349-.374-1.297-.789.027-.216.325-.437.893-.663 3.498-1.524 5.83-2.529 6.998-3.014 3.332-1.386 4.025-1.627 4.476-1.635z\"/>\n                </svg>\n              )},\n              { value: \"discord\", label: \"Discord\", icon: (\n                <svg width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path d=\"M20.317 4.3698a19.7913 19.7913 0 00-4.8851-1.5152.0741.0741 0 00-.0785.0371c-.211.3753-.4447.8648-.6083 1.2495-1.8447-.2762-3.68-.2762-5.4868 0-.1636-.3933-.4058-.8742-.6177-1.2495a.077.077 0 00-.0785-.037 19.7363 19.7363 0 00-4.8852 1.515.0699.0699 0 00-.0321.0277C.5334 9.0458-.319 13.5799.0992 18.0578a.0824.0824 0 00.0312.0561c2.0528 1.5076 4.0413 2.4228 5.9929 3.0294a.0777.0777 0 00.0842-.0276c.4616-.6304.8731-1.2952 1.226-1.9942a.076.076 0 00-.0416-.1057c-.6528-.2476-1.2743-.5495-1.8722-.8923a.077.077 0 01-.0076-.1277c.1258-.0943.2517-.1923.3718-.2914a.0743.0743 0 01.0776-.0105c3.9278 1.7933 8.18 1.7933 12.0614 0a.0739.0739 0 01.0785.0095c.1202.099.246.1981.3728.2924a.077.077 0 01-.0066.1276 12.2986 12.2986 0 01-1.873.8914.0766.0766 0 00-.0407.1067c.3604.698.7719 1.3628 1.225 1.9932a.076.076 0 00.0842.0286c1.961-.6067 3.9495-1.5219 6.0023-3.0294a.077.077 0 00.0313-.0552c.5004-5.177-.8382-9.6739-3.5485-13.6604a.061.061 0 00-.0312-.0286zM8.02 15.3312c-1.1825 0-2.1569-1.0857-2.1569-2.419 0-1.3332.9555-2.4189 2.157-2.4189 1.2108 0 2.1757 1.0952 2.1568 2.419 0 1.3332-.9555 2.4189-2.1569 2.4189zm7.9748 0c-1.1825 0-2.1569-1.0857-2.1569-2.419 0-1.3332.9554-2.4189 2.1569-2.4189 1.2108 0 2.1757 1.0952 2.1568 2.419 0 1.3332-.946 2.4189-2.1568 2.4189z\"/>\n                </svg>\n              )},\n            ].map((opt) => (\n              <button\n                key={opt.value}\n                type=\"button\"\n                role=\"radio\"\n                aria-checked={platformPreference === opt.value}\n                onClick={() => setPlatformPreference(opt.value)}\n                className=\"flex-1 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold transition-colors cursor-pointer\"\n                style={{\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  display: \"flex\",\n                  alignItems: \"center\",\n                  justifyContent: \"center\",\n                  gap: \"0.4rem\",\n                  backgroundColor:\n                    platformPreference === opt.value\n                      ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"transparent\",\n                  color:\n                    platformPreference === opt.value\n                      ? \"white\"\n                      : \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  border:\n                    platformPreference === opt.value\n                      ? \"1.5px solid var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                }}\n              >\n                {opt.icon}\n                {opt.label}\n              </button>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div\n          className=\"flex items-start gap-3 p-4 rounded-lg cursor-pointer\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: requiresApproval\n              ? \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.06)\"\n              : \"transparent\",\n            border: requiresApproval\n              ? \"1.5px solid var(--color-accent)\"\n              : \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n          }}\n          role=\"checkbox\"\n          aria-checked={requiresApproval}\n          aria-label=\"Require approval for new members\"\n          tabIndex={0}\n          onClick={() => setRequiresApproval(!requiresApproval)}\n          onKeyDown={(e) => {\n            if (e.key === \" \" || e.key === \"Enter\") {\n              e.preventDefault();\n              setRequiresApproval(!requiresApproval);\n            }\n          }}\n        >\n          <div\n            className=\"w-5 h-5 rounded flex items-center justify-center mt-0.5\"\n            style={{\n              flexShrink: 0,\n              backgroundColor: requiresApproval\n                ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                : \"transparent\",\n              border: requiresApproval\n                ? \"none\"\n                : \"2px solid var(--color-border)\",\n            }}\n          >\n            {requiresApproval && (\n              <svg width=\"12\" height=\"12\" viewBox=\"0 0 12 12\" fill=\"white\">\n                <path d=\"M10 3L4.5 8.5L2 6\" stroke=\"white\" strokeWidth=\"2\" fill=\"none\" strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\"/>\n              </svg>\n            )}\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <div\n              className=\"text-sm font-semibold\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              Require approval for new members\n            </div>\n            <div\n              className=\"text-xs mt-0.5\"\n              style={{\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Members must be approved by you before joining the group.\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex gap-3\">\n          <button\n            type=\"button\"\n            className=\"flex-1 py-2.5 px-4 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold cursor-pointer\"\n            style={{\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              border: \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              backgroundColor: \"transparent\",\n            }}\n            onClick={() => router.push(`/listings/${id}`)}\n          >\n            Cancel\n          </button>\n          <button\n            type=\"submit\"\n            className=\"btn-primary flex-1\"\n            disabled={loading}\n          >\n            {loading ? \"Saving...\" : \"Save changes\"}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </form>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","numLines":478,"startLine":1,"totalLines":478}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01RMiNtk8Fj97vRfE1PH78Tu","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useState } from \"react\";\n     4→import { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n     5→import BookSearch from \"@/components/BookSearch\";\n     6→import Image from \"next/image\";\n     7→\n     8→export default function CreateListingPage() {\n     9→  const router = useRouter();\n    10→  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n    11→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n    12→\n    13→  const [bookTitle, setBookTitle] = useState(\"\");\n    14→  const [bookAuthor, setBookAuthor] = useState(\"\");\n    15→  const [bookCoverUrl, setBookCoverUrl] = useState(\"\");\n    16→  const [bookOlid, setBookOlid] = useState(\"\");\n    17→  const [language, setLanguage] = useState(\"English\");\n    18→  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n    19→  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(\"\");\n    20→  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"text\");\n    21→  const [maxGroupSize, setMaxGroupSize] = useState(\"4\");\n    22→  const [requiresApproval, setRequiresApproval] = useState(false);\n    23→  const [platformPreference, setPlatformPreference] = useState(\"telegram\");\n    24→\n    25→  const handleBookSelect = (book: {\n    26→    title: string;\n    27→    author: string;\n    28→    coverUrl: string;\n    29→    olid: string;\n    30→  }) => {\n    31→    setBookTitle(book.title);\n    32→    setBookAuthor(book.author);\n    33→    setBookCoverUrl(book.coverUrl);\n    34→    setBookOlid(book.olid);\n    35→  };\n    36→\n    37→  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    38→    e.preventDefault();\n    39→    setError(\"\");\n    40→    setLoading(true);\n    41→\n    42→    try {\n    43→      const res = await fetch(\"/api/listings/create\", {\n    44→        method: \"POST\",\n    45→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    46→        body: JSON.stringify({\n    47→          bookTitle,\n    48→          bookAuthor,\n    49→          bookCoverUrl,\n    50→          bookOlid,\n    51→          language,\n    52→          readingPace,\n    53→          startDate,\n    54→          meetingFormat,\n    55→          maxGroupSize,\n    56→          requiresApproval,\n    57→          platformPreference,\n    58→        }),\n    59→      });\n    60→\n    61→      const data = await res.json();\n    62→\n    63→      if (!res.ok) {\n    64→        if (res.status === 401) {\n    65→          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n    66→          return;\n    67→        }\n    68→        setError(data.error || \"Failed to create listing\");\n    69→        return;\n    70→      }\n    71→\n    72→      router.push(`/listings/${data.id}`);\n    73→    } catch {\n    74→      setError(\"Something went wrong. Please try again.\");\n    75→    } finally {\n    76→      setLoading(false);\n    77→    }\n    78→  };\n    79→\n    80→  return (\n    81→    <div className=\"max-w-lg mx-auto\">\n    82→      <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-3xl mb-2\">Start a reading group</h1>\n    83→      <p\n    84→        className=\"mb-6 sm:mb-8\"\n    85→        style={{\n    86→          color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n    87→          fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n    88→          fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n    89→        }}\n    90→      >\n    91→        Choose a book, set your pace, and wait for readers to join.\n    92→      </p>\n    93→\n    94→      {error && (\n    95→        <div\n    96→          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n    97→ e.preventDefault();\n   354→              setRequiresApproval(!requiresApproval);\n   355→            }\n   356→          }}\n   357→        >\n   358→          <div\n   359→            className=\"w-5 h-5 rounded flex items-center justify-center mt-0.5\"\n   360→            style={{\n   361→              flexShrink: 0,\n   362→              backgroundColor: requiresApproval\n   363→                ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n   364→                : \"transparent\",\n   365→              border: requiresApproval\n   366→                ? \"none\"\n   367→                : \"2px fill=\"white\">\n   372→                <path d=\"M10 3L4.5 8.5L2 6\" stroke=\"white\" strokeWidth=\"2\" fill=\"none\" strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\"/>\n   373→              </svg>\n 406→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"edb2a5b9-962a-43da-80eb-9f8f7e8c3722","uuid":"b715c94c-c40c-44ef-995d-bee808516402","timestamp":"2026-03-24T06:03:19.468Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/create/page.tsx","content":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport BookSearch from \"@/components/BookSearch\";\nimport Image from \"next/image\";\n\nexport default function CreateListingPage() {\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n\n  const [bookTitle, setBookTitle] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookAuthor, setBookAuthor] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookCoverUrl, setBookCoverUrl] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookOlid, setBookOlid] = useState(\"\");\n  const [language, setLanguage] = useState(\"English\");\n  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(\"\");\n  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"text\");\n  const [maxGroupSize, setMaxGroupSize] = useState(\"4\");\n  const [requiresApproval, setRequiresApproval] = useState(false);\n  const [platformPreference, setPlatformPreference] = useState(\"telegram\");\n\n  const handleBookSelect = (book: {\n    title: string;\n    author: string;\n    coverUrl: string;\n    olid: string;\n  }) => {\n    setBookTitle(book.title);\n    setBookAuthor(book.author);\n    setBookCoverUrl(book.coverUrl);\n    setBookOlid(book.olid);\n  };\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setError(\"\");\n    setLoading(true);\n\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(\"/api/listings/create\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          bookTitle,\n          bookAuthor,\n          bookCoverUrl,\n          bookOlid,\n          language,\n          readingPace,\n          startDate,\n          meetingFormat,\n          maxGroupSize,\n          requiresApproval,\n          platformPreference,\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const data = await res.json();\n\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error || \"Failed to create listing\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      router.push(`/listings/${data.id}`);\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Something went wrong. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-lg mx-auto\">\n      <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-3xl mb-2\">Start a reading group</h1>\n      <p\n        className=\"mb-6 sm:mb-8\"\n        style={{\n          color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n          fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n        }}\n      >\n        Choose a book, set your pace, and wait for readers to join.\n      </p>\n\n      {error && (\n        <div\n          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n          role=\"alert\"\n        >\n          {error}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"space-y-5\">\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Book\n          </label>\n          <BookSearch onSelect={handleBookSelect} />\n          {bookTitle && (\n            <div\n              className=\"mt-2 flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg\"\n              style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.06)\" }}\n            >\n              {bookCoverUrl && (\n                <Image\n                  src={bookCoverUrl}\n                  alt={`Cover of ${bookTitle}`}\n                  width={40}\n                  height={56}\n                  className=\"w-10 h-14 object-cover rounded\"\n                />\n              )}\n              <div>\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-sm font-semibold\"\n                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  {bookTitle}\n                </div>\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-xs\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  by {bookAuthor}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Discussion language\n          </label>\n          <select\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={language}\n            onChange={(e) => setLanguage(e.target.value)}\n          >\n            <option>English</option>\n            <option>Spanish</option>\n            <option>French</option>\n            <option>German</option>\n            <option>Russian</option>\n            <option>Portuguese</option>\n            <option>Italian</option>\n            <option>Japanese</option>\n            <option>Chinese</option>\n            <option>Korean</option>\n            <option>Other</option>\n          </select>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Reading pace\n          </label>\n          <input\n            type=\"text\"\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={readingPace}\n            onChange={(e) => setReadingPace(e.target.value)}\n            required\n            placeholder='e.g. \"1 chapter per week\" or \"50 pages per day\"'\n          />\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Start date\n          </label>\n          <input\n            type=\"date\"\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={startDate}\n            onChange={(e) => setStartDate(e.target.value)}\n            required\n          />\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Meeting format\n          </label>\n          <div className=\"flex gap-3\" role=\"radiogroup\" aria-label=\"Meeting format\">\n            {[\n              { value: \"text\", label: \"Text chat\" },\n              { value: \"voice\", label: \"Voice calls\" },\n              { value: \"mixed\", label: \"Mixed\" },\n            ].map((opt) => (\n              <button\n                key={opt.value}\n                type=\"button\"\n                role=\"radio\"\n                aria-checked={meetingFormat === opt.value}\n                onClick={() => setMeetingFormat(opt.value)}\n                className=\"flex-1 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold transition-colors cursor-pointer\"\n                style={{\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  backgroundColor:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"transparent\",\n                  color:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"white\"\n                      : \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  border:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"1.5px solid var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                }}\n              >\n                {opt.label}\n              </button>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Maximum group size\n          </label>\n          <select\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={maxGroupSize}\n            onChange={(e) => setMaxGroupSize(e.target.value)}\n          >\n            {[2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 10, 15, 20].map((n) => (\n              <option key={n} value={n}>\n                {n} readers\n              </option>\n            ))}\n          </select>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Chat platform\n          </label>\n          <p\n            className=\"text-xs mb-2\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            Where your group will connect once it&apos;s full\n          </p>\n          <div className=\"flex gap-3\" role=\"radiogroup\" aria-label=\"Chat platform\">\n            {[\n              { value: \"telegram\", label: \"Telegram\", icon: (\n                <svg width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0 0 12-12A12 12 0 0 0 12 0a12 12 0 0 0-.056 0zm4.962 7.224c.1-.002.321.023.465.14a.506.506 0 0 1 .171.325c.016.093.036.306.02.472-.18 1.898-.962 6.502-1.36 8.627-.168.9-.499 1.201-.82 1.23-.696.065-1.225-.46-1.9-.902-1.056-.693-1.653-1.124-2.678-1.8-1.185-.78-.417-1.21.258-1.91.177-.184 3.247-2.977 3.307-3.23.007-.032.014-.15-.056-.212s-.174-.041-.249-.024c-.106.024-1.793 4.476-1.635z\"/>\n                </svg>\n              )},\n              { value: \"discord\", label: \"Discord\", icon: (\n                <svg width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" 0 1.3332-.9555 2.4189-2.1569 2.4189zm7.9748 0c-1.1825 0-2.1569-1.0857-2.1569-2.419 0-1.3332.9554-2.4189 2.1569-2.4189 1.2108 0 2.1757 1.0952 2.1568 2.419 0 1.3332-.946 2.4189-2.1568 2.4189z\"/>\n                </svg>\n              )},\n            ].map((opt) => (\n              <button\n                key={opt.value}\n                type=\"button\"\n                role=\"radio\"\n                aria-checked={platformPreference === opt.value}\n                onClick={() => setPlatformPreference(opt.value)}\n                className=\"flex-1 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold transition-colors cursor-pointer\"\n                style={{\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  display: \"flex\",\n                  alignItems: \"center\",\n                  justifyContent: \"center\",\n                  gap: \"0.4rem\",\n                  backgroundColor:\n                    platformPreference === opt.value\n                      ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"transparent\",\n                  color:\n                    platformPreference === opt.value\n                      ? \"white\"\n                      : \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  border:\n                    platformPreference === opt.value\n                      ? \"1.5px solid var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                }}\n              >\n                {opt.icon}\n                {opt.label}\n              </button>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div\n          className=\"flex items-start gap-3 p-4 rounded-lg cursor-pointer\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: requiresApproval\n              ? \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.06)\"\n              : \"transparent\",\n            border: requiresApproval\n              ? \"1.5px solid var(--color-accent)\"\n              : \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n          }}\n          role=\"checkbox\"\n          aria-checked={requiresApproval}\n          aria-label=\"Require approval for new members\"\n          tabIndex={0}\n          onClick={() => setRequiresApproval(!requiresApproval)}\n          onKeyDown={(e) => {\n            if (e.key === \" \" || e.key === \"Enter\") {\n              e.preventDefault();\n              setRequiresApproval(!requiresApproval);\n            }\n          }}\n        >\n          <div\n            className=\"w-5 h-5 rounded flex items-center justify-center mt-0.5\"\n            style={{\n              flexShrink: 0,\n              backgroundColor: requiresApproval\n                ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                : \"transparent\",\n              border: requiresApproval\n                ? \"none\"\n                : \"2px solid var(--color-border)\",\n            }}\n          >\n            {requiresApproval && (\n              <svg width=\"12\" height=\"12\" viewBox=\"0 0 12 12\" fill=\"white\">\n                <path d=\"M10 3L4.5 8.5L2 6\" stroke=\"white\" strokeWidth=\"2\" fill=\"none\" strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\"/>\n              </svg>\n            )}\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <div\n              className=\"text-sm font-semibold\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              Require approval for new members\n            </div>\n            <div\n              className=\"text-xs mt-0.5\"\n              style={{\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Members must be approved by you before joining the group.\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <button\n          type=\"submit\"\n          className=\"btn-primary w-full\"\n          disabled={loading || !bookTitle}\n        >\n          {loading ? \"Creating...\" : \"Create reading group\"}\n        </button>\n      </form>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","numLines":406,"startLine":1,"totalLines":406}}}

(\n    48→        <div className=\"text-center py-12\">\n    49→          <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n    50→            No notifications yet\n    51→          </p>\n    52→        </div>\n    53→      ) : (\n    54→        <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n    55→          {notifications.map((n) => (\n    56→            <Link\n    57→              key={n.id}\n    58→              href={n.listing_id ? `/listings/${n.listing_id}` : \"#\"}\n    59→              className=\"card block hover:shadow-sm transition-shadow\"\n    60→              style={{\n    61→                borderLeftWidth: \"3px\",\n    62→                borderLeftColor: n.is_read\n    63→                  ? \"var(--color-border)\"\n    64→                  : \"var(--color-accent)\",\n    65→              }}\n    66→              aria-label={`${!n.is_read ? \"Unread: \" : \"\"}${n.message}`}\n    67→            >\n    68→              {!n.is_read && (\n    69→                <span className=\"sr-only\">Unread</span>\n    70→              )}\n    71→              <p\n    72→                className=\"text-sm\"\n    73→                style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n    74→              >\n    75→                {n.message}\n    76→              </p>\n    77→              <p\n    78→                className=\"text-xs mt-1\"\n    79→                style={{\n    80→                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n    81→                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n    82→                }}\n    83→              >\n    84→                {new Date(n.created_at).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n    85→                  month: \"short\",\n    86→                  day: \"numeric\",\n    87→                  hour: \"numeric\",\n    88→                  minute: \"2-digit\",\n    89→                })}\n    90→              </p>\n    91→            </Link>\n    92→          ))}\n    93→        </div>\n    94→      )}\n    95→    </div>\n    96→  );\n    97→}\n    98→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"edb2a5b9-962a-43da-80eb-9f8f7e8c3722","uuid":"6426a767-d2ed-4a9b-b187-aff3051d1c2d","timestamp":"2026-03-24T06:03:19.704Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/notifications/page.tsx","content":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\n\ninterface Notification {\n  id: number;\n  listing_id: number;\n  type: string;\n  message: string;\n  is_read: number;\n  created_at: string;\n  book_title: string;\n}\n\nexport default function NotificationsPage() {\n  const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState<Notification[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetch(\"/api/notifications\")\n      .then((r) => r.json())\n      .then((data) => {\n        setNotifications(data.notifications || []);\n        setLoading(false);\n        // Mark all as read\n        fetch(\"/api/notifications\", {\n          method: \"PATCH\",\n          headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({}),\n        });\n      });\n  }, []);\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n      <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-3xl mb-4 sm:mb-6\">Notifications</h1>\n\n      {notifications.length === 0 ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-12\">\n          <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n            No notifications yet\n          </p>\n        </div>\n      ) : (\n        <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n          {notifications.map((n) => (\n            <Link\n              key={n.id}\n              href={n.listing_id ? `/listings/${n.listing_id}` : \"#\"}\n              className=\"card block hover:shadow-sm transition-shadow\"\n              style={{\n                borderLeftWidth: \"3px\",\n                borderLeftColor: n.is_read\n                  ? \"var(--color-border)\"\n                  : \"var(--color-accent)\",\n              }}\n              aria-label={`${!n.is_read ? \"Unread: \" : \"\"}${n.message}`}\n            >\n              {!n.is_read && (\n                <span className=\"sr-only\">Unread</span>\n              )}\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm\"\n                style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n              >\n                {n.message}\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-xs mt-1\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                }}\n              >\n                {new Date(n.created_at).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n                  month: \"short\",\n                  day: \"numeric\",\n                  hour: \"numeric\",\n                  minute: \"2-digit\",\n                })}\n              </p>\n            </Link>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","numLines":98,"startLine":1,"totalLines":98}}}
