Please try again.\");\n          setLoading(false);\n        });\n    },\n    []\n  );","newString":"  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n\n  const fetchListings = useCallback(\n    (query: string, format: string, sortBy: string, pace?: string, dateFrom?: string, pageNum?: number) => {\n      // Abort any in-flight request to prevent stale responses overwriting newer ones\n      if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n      const controller = new AbortController();\n      abortRef.current = controller;\n\n      setLoading(true);\n      const params = new URLSearchParams();\n      if (query) params.set(\"q\", query);\n      if (format) params.set(\"meeting_format\", format);\n      if (pace) params.set(\"reading_pace\", pace);\n      if (dateFrom) params.set(\"start_date_from\", dateFrom);\n      if (sortBy) params.set(\"sort\", sortBy);\n      if (pageNum && pageNum > 1) params.set(\"page\", String(pageNum));\n\n      const qs = params.toString();\n      fetch(`/api/listings${qs ? `?${qs}` : \"\"}`, { signal: controller.signal })\n        .then((r) => {\n          if (!r.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to load listings\");\n          return r.json();\n        })\n        .then((data) => {\n          if (controller.signal.aborted) return;\n          setListings(data.listings || []);\n          if (data.pagination) {\n            setTotalPages(data.pagination.totalPages || 1);\n            setTotalResults(data.pagination.total || 0);\n          }\n          setError(null);\n          setLoading(false);\n        })\n        .catch((err) => {\n          if ((err as Error).name === \"AbortError\") return;\n          setError(err.message || \"Could not load listings. Please try again.\");\n          setLoading(false);\n        });\n    },\n    []\n  );","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  requires_approval: number;\n  platform_preference: string;\n  member_count: number;\n  author_name: string;\n  created_at: string;\n}\n\nexport default function HomePage() {\n  const [listings, setListings] = useState<Listing[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n\n  // Search & filter state\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"\");\n  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n  const [startDateFrom, setStartDateFrom] = useState(\"\");\n  const [sort, setSort] = useState(\"newest\");\n  const [filtersOpen, setFiltersOpen] = useState(false);\n\n  // Pagination state\n  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\n  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(1);\n  const [totalResults, setTotalResults] = useState(0);\n\n  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n\n  const fetchListings = useCallback(\n    (query: string, format: string, sortBy: string, pace?: string, dateFrom?: string, pageNum?: number) => {\n      setLoading(true);\n      const params = new URLSearchParams();\n      if (query) params.set(\"q\", query);\n      if (format) params.set(\"meeting_format\", format);\n      if (pace) params.set(\"reading_pace\", pace);\n      if (dateFrom) params.set(\"start_date_from\", dateFrom);\n      if (sortBy) params.set(\"sort\", sortBy);\n      if (pageNum && pageNum > 1) params.set(\"page\", String(pageNum));\n\n      const qs = params.toString();\n      fetch(`/api/listings${qs ? `?${qs}` : \"\"}`)\n        .then((r) => {\n          if (!r.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to load listings\");\n          return r.json();\n        })\n        .then((data) => {\n          setListings(data.listings || []);\n          if (data.pagination) {\n            setTotalPages(data.pagination.totalPages || 1);\n            setTotalResults(data.pagination.total || 0);\n          }\n          setError(null);\n          setLoading(false);\n        })\n        .catch((err) => {\n          setError(err.message || \"Could not load listings. Please try again.\");\n          setLoading(false);\n        });\n    },\n    []\n  );\n\n  // Initial fetch\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n  }, [fetchListings]);\n\n  // Debounced search\n  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSearchQuery(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n      fetchListings(value, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n    }, 400);\n  };\n\n  // Immediate filter changes\n  const handleFormatChange = (value: string) => {\n    setMeetingFormat(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, value, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n  };\n\n  const handlePaceChange = (value: string) => {\n    setReadingPace(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, value, startDateFrom, 1);\n  };\n\n  const handleStartDateFromChange = (value: string) => {\n    setStartDateFrom(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, value, 1);\n  };\n\n  const handleSortChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSort(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, value, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n  };\n\n  const handlePageChange = (newPage: number) => {\n    setPage(newPage);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, newPage);\n    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: \"smooth\" });\n  };\n\n  const clearFilters = () => {\n    setSearchQuery(\"\");\n    setMeetingFormat(\"\");\n    setReadingPace(\"\");\n    setStartDateFrom(\"\");\n    setSort(\"newest\");\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n  };\n\n  const hasActiveFilters = searchQuery || meetingFormat || readingPace || startDateFrom || sort !== \"newest\";\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div className=\"text-center mb-6 sm:mb-8 mt-2 sm:mt-4\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-4xl mb-2 sm:mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>\n          Find your reading companion\n        </h1>\n        <p\n          className=\"text-sm sm:text-lg max-w-xl mx-auto\"\n          style={{\n            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          Browse open reading groups, join one that matches your pace, and\n          connect on Telegram to read together.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Search & Filter Bar */}\n      <div className=\"mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex gap-3 items-center\">\n          <div className=\"flex-1 relative\">\n            <input\n              type=\"text\"\n              placeholder=\"Search by book title or author...\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"input-field\"\n              style={{ paddingLeft: \"2.5rem\" }}\n            />\n            <svg\n              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n              style={{\n                position: \"absolute\",\n                left: \"0.75rem\",\n                top: \"50%\",\n                transform: \"translateY(-50%)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                width: \"1.125rem\",\n                height: \"1.125rem\",\n                pointerEvents: \"none\",\n              }}\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n            >\n              <circle cx={11} cy={11} r={8} />\n              <line x1={21} y1={21} x2={16.65} y2={16.65} />\n            </svg>\n          </div>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => setFiltersOpen(!filtersOpen)}\n            className=\"btn-secondary\"\n            aria-expanded={filtersOpen}\n            aria-controls=\"filter-panel\"\n            style={{\n              display: \"flex\",\n              alignItems: \"center\",\n              gap: \"0.375rem\",\n              whiteSpace: \"nowrap\",\n              position: \"relative\",\n            }}\n          >\n            <svg\n              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n              width=\"16\"\n              height=\"16\"\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n            >\n              <line x1={4} y1={6} x2={20} y2={6} />\n              <line x1={7} y1={12} x2={17} y2={12} />\n              <line x1={10} y1={18} x2={14} y2={18} />\n            </svg>\n            Filters\n            {hasActiveFilters && (\n              <span\n                aria-hidden=\"true\"\n                style={{\n                  width: \"0.5rem\",\n                  height: \"0.5rem\",\n                  borderRadius: \"50%\",\n                  backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                  position: \"absolute\",\n                  top: \"0.375rem\",\n                  right: \"0.375rem\",\n                }}\n              />\n            )}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Filter panel */}\n        {filtersOpen && (\n          <div\n            id=\"filter-panel\"\n            className=\"card mt-3\"\n            style={{ padding: \"1rem 1.25rem\" }}\n          >\n            <div\n              className=\"grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3 sm:gap-4 items-end\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Meeting format\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={meetingFormat}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleFormatChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"\">All formats</option>\n                  <option value=\"voice\">Voice calls</option>\n                  <option value=\"text\">Text chat</option>\n                  <option value=\"mixed\">Mixed</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              <div>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Reading pace\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={readingPace}\n                  onChange={(e) => handlePaceChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"\">All paces</option>\n                  <option value=\"chapter\">Chapter-based</option>\n                  <option value=\"pages\">Pages-based</option>\n                  <option value=\"week\">Weekly</option>\n                  <option value=\"day\">Daily</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              <div>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Starting from\n                </label>\n                <input\n                  type=\"date\"\n                  value={startDateFrom}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleStartDateFromChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                />\n              </div>\n\n              <div>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Sort by\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={sort}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleSortChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"newest\">Newest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"oldest\">Oldest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"start_date\">Start date (soonest)</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              {hasActiveFilters && (\n                <button\n                  onClick={clearFilters}\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n                    fontWeight: 600,\n                    cursor: \"pointer\",\n                    background: \"none\",\n                    border: \"none\",\n                    padding: \"0.5rem 0\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Clear all\n                </button>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Results */}\n      {loading ? (\n        <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n          {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => (\n            <div key={i} className=\"card flex gap-4\">\n              <div\n                className=\"skeleton\"\n                style={{ width: \"4rem\", height: \"6rem\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n              />\n              <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                <div\n                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-heading\"\n                  style={{ width: `${60 - i * 5}%` }}\n                />\n                <div\n                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-text\"\n                  style={{ width: `${45 - i * 5}%` }}\n                />\n                <div className=\"flex gap-2 mt-2\">\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"5rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"4rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"5.5rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      ) : error ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          <svg\n            width=\"40\"\n            height=\"40\"\n            viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n            fill=\"none\"\n            stroke=\"var(--color-error)\"\n            strokeWidth={1.5}\n            style={{ margin: \"0 auto 0.75rem\" }}\n          >\n            <circle cx={12} cy={12} r={10} />\n            <line x1={12} y1={8} x2={12} y2={12} />\n            <line x1={12} y1={16} x2={12.01} y2={16} />\n          </svg>\n          <p\n            className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n            style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            {error}\n          </p>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom)}\n            className=\"btn-primary\"\n            style={{ marginTop: \"0.75rem\" }}\n          >\n            Try again\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      ) : listings.length === 0 ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          {hasActiveFilters ? (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No matching reading groups\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Try adjusting your search or filters to find more groups.\n              </p>\n              <button onClick={clearFilters} className=\"btn-secondary\">\n                Clear filters\n              </button>\n            </>\n          ) : (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No reading groups yet\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Be the first to create a reading group and find your book\n                companions.\n              </p>\n              <Link href=\"/listings/create\" className=\"btn-primary\">\n                Create the first listing\n              </Link>\n            </>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      ) : (\n        <>\n          <p\n            className=\"mb-3 text-sm\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            {totalResults} open group{totalResults !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}\n            {hasActiveFilters ? \" found\" : \"\"}\n            {totalPages > 1 ? ` · Page ${page} of ${totalPages}` : \"\"}\n          </p>\n          <div className=\"grid gap-4\" role=\"list\" aria-label=\"Reading groups\">\n            {listings.map((listing) => (\n              <Link\n                key={listing.id}\n                href={`/listings/${listing.id}`}\n                className=\"card hover:shadow-md transition-shadow flex gap-4\"\n                role=\"listitem\"\n              >\n                <BookCover\n                  src={listing.book_cover_url}\n                  alt={listing.book_title}\n                  width={64}\n                  height={96}\n                  className=\"w-16 h-24 object-cover rounded\"\n                  style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n                />\n\n                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                  <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold truncate\">\n                    {listing.book_title}\n                  </h3>\n                  <p\n                    className=\"text-sm mb-2 truncate\"\n                    style={{\n                      color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    }}\n                  >\n                    by {listing.book_author} · posted by {listing.author_name}\n                  </p>\n\n                  <div\n                    className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2\"\n                    style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                  >\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {listing.reading_pace}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Starts{\" \"}\n                      {new Date(listing.start_date).toLocaleDateString(\n                        \"en-US\",\n                        {\n                          month: \"short\",\n                          day: \"numeric\",\n                        }\n                      )}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {listing.member_count}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n                    </span>\n                    {listing.requires_approval ? (\n                      <span\n                        className=\"badge\"\n                        style={{\n                          backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.08)\",\n                          color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        Approval required\n                      </span>\n                    ) : null}\n                    {listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? (\n                      <span\n                        className=\"badge\"\n                        style={{\n                          backgroundColor: \"rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.08)\",\n Date(listing.start_date + \"T00:00:00\").toLocaleDateString(\n                        \"en-US\",\n                        {\n                          month: \"short\",\n                          day: \"numeric\",\n                        }\n                      )}","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  requires_approval: number;\n  platform_preference: string;\n  member_count: number;\n  author_name: string;\n  created_at: string;\n}\n\nexport default function HomePage() {\n  const [listings, setListings] = useState<Listing[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n\n  // Search & filter state\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"\");\n  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n  const [startDateFrom, setStartDateFrom] = useState(\"\");\n  const [sort, setSort] = useState(\"newest\");\n  const [filtersOpen, setFiltersOpen] = useState(false);\n\n  // Pagination state\n  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\n  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(1);\n  const [totalResults, setTotalResults] = useState(0);\n\n  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n\n  const fetchListings = useCallback(\n    (query: string, format: string, sortBy: string, pace?: string, dateFrom?: string, pageNum?: number) => {\n      // Abort any in-flight request to prevent stale responses overwriting newer ones\n      if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n      const controller = new AbortController();\n      abortRef.current = controller;\n\n      setLoading(true);\n      const params = new URLSearchParams();\n      if (query) params.set(\"q\", query);\n      if (format) params.set(\"meeting_format\", format);\n      if (pace) params.set(\"reading_pace\", pace);\n      if (dateFrom) params.set(\"start_date_from\", dateFrom);\n      if (sortBy) params.set(\"sort\", sortBy);\n      if (pageNum && pageNum > 1) params.set(\"page\", String(pageNum));\n\n      const qs = params.toString();\n      fetch(`/api/listings${qs ? `?${qs}` : \"\"}`, { signal: controller.signal })\n        .then((r) => {\n          if (!r.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to load listings\");\n          return r.json();\n        })\n        .then((data) => {\n          if (controller.signal.aborted) return;\n          setListings(data.listings || []);\n          if (data.pagination) {\n            setTotalPages(data.pagination.totalPages || 1);\n            setTotalResults(data.pagination.total || 0);\n          }\n          setError(null);\n          setLoading(false);\n        })\n        .catch((err) => {\n          if ((err as Error).name === \"AbortError\") return;\n          setError(err.message || \"Could not load listings. Please try again.\");\n          setLoading(false);\n        });\n    },\n    []\n  );\n\n  // Initial fetch\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n  }, [fetchListings]);\n\n  // Debounced search\n  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSearchQuery(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n      fetchListings(value, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n    }, 400);\n  };\n\n  // Immediate filter changes\n  const handleFormatChange = (value: string) => {\n    setMeetingFormat(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, value, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n  };\n\n  const handlePaceChange = (value: string) => {\n    setReadingPace(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, value, startDateFrom, 1);\n  };\n\n  const handleStartDateFromChange = (value: string) => {\n    setStartDateFrom(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, value, 1);\n  };\n\n  const handleSortChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSort(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, value, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n  };\n\n  const handlePageChange = (newPage: number) => {\n    setPage(newPage);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, newPage);\n    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: \"smooth\" });\n  };\n\n  const clearFilters = () => {\n    setSearchQuery(\"\");\n    setMeetingFormat(\"\");\n    setReadingPace(\"\");\n    setStartDateFrom(\"\");\n    setSort(\"newest\");\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n  };\n\n  const hasActiveFilters = searchQuery || meetingFormat || readingPace || startDateFrom || sort !== \"newest\";\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div className=\"text-center mb-6 sm:mb-8 mt-2 sm:mt-4\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-4xl mb-2 sm:mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>\n          Find your reading companion\n        </h1>\n        <p\n          className=\"text-sm sm:text-lg max-w-xl mx-auto\"\n          style={{\n            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          Browse open reading groups, join one that matches your pace, and\n          connect on Telegram to read together.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Search & Filter Bar */}\n      <div className=\"mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex gap-3 items-center\">\n          <div className=\"flex-1 relative\">\n            <input\n              type=\"text\"\n              placeholder=\"Search by book title or author...\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"input-field\"\n              style={{ paddingLeft: \"2.5rem\" }}\n            />\n            <svg\n              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n              style={{\n                position: \"absolute\",\n                left: \"0.75rem\",\n                top: \"50%\",\n                transform: \"translateY(-50%)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                width: \"1.125rem\",\n                height: \"1.125rem\",\n                pointerEvents: \"none\",\n              }}\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n            >\n              <circle cx={11} cy={11} r={8} />\n              <line x1={21} y1={21} x2={16.65} y2={16.65} />\n            </svg>\n          </div>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => setFiltersOpen(!filtersOpen)}\n            className=\"btn-secondary\"\n            aria-expanded={filtersOpen}\n            aria-controls=\"filter-panel\"\n            style={{\n              display: \"flex\",\n              alignItems: \"center\",\n              gap: \"0.375rem\",\n              whiteSpace: \"nowrap\",\n              position: \"relative\",\n            }}\n          >\n            <svg\n              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n              width=\"16\"\n              height=\"16\"\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n            >\n              <line x1={4} y1={6} x2={20} y2={6} />\n              <line x1={7} y1={12} x2={17} y2={12} />\n              <line x1={10} y1={18} x2={14} y2={18} />\n            </svg>\n            Filters\n            {hasActiveFilters && (\n              <span\n                aria-hidden=\"true\"\n                style={{\n                  width: \"0.5rem\",\n                  height: \"0.5rem\",\n                  borderRadius: \"50%\",\n                  backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                  position: \"absolute\",\n                  top: \"0.375rem\",\n                  right: \"0.375rem\",\n                }}\n              />\n            )}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Filter panel */}\n        {filtersOpen && (\n          <div\n            id=\"filter-panel\"\n            className=\"card mt-3\"\n            style={{ padding: \"1rem 1.25rem\" }}\n          >\n            <div\n              className=\"grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3 sm:gap-4 items-end\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Meeting format\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={meetingFormat}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleFormatChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"\">All formats</option>\n                  <option value=\"voice\">Voice calls</option>\n                  <option value=\"text\">Text chat</option>\n                  <option value=\"mixed\">Mixed</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              <div>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Reading pace\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={readingPace}\n                  onChange={(e) => handlePaceChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"\">All paces</option>\n                  <option value=\"chapter\">Chapter-based</option>\n                  <option value=\"pages\">Pages-based</option>\n                  <option value=\"week\">Weekly</option>\n                  <option value=\"day\">Daily</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              <div>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Starting from\n                </label>\n                <input\n                  type=\"date\"\n                  value={startDateFrom}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleStartDateFromChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                />\n              </div>\n\n              <div>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Sort by\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={sort}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleSortChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"newest\">Newest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"oldest\">Oldest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"start_date\">Start date (soonest)</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              {hasActiveFilters && (\n                <button\n                  onClick={clearFilters}\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n                    fontWeight: 600,\n                    cursor: \"pointer\",\n                    background: \"none\",\n                    border: \"none\",\n                    padding: \"0.5rem 0\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Clear all\n                </button>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Results */}\n      {loading ? (\n        <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n          {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => (\n            <div key={i} className=\"card flex gap-4\">\n              <div\n                className=\"skeleton\"\n                style={{ width: \"4rem\", height: \"6rem\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n              />\n              <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                <div\n                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-heading\"\n                  style={{ width: `${60 - i * 5}%` }}\n                />\n                <div\n                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-text\"\n                  style={{ width: `${45 - i * 5}%` }}\n                />\n                <div className=\"flex gap-2 mt-2\">\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"5rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"4rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"5.5rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      ) : error ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          <svg\n            width=\"40\"\n            height=\"40\"\n            viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n            fill=\"none\"\n            stroke=\"var(--color-error)\"\n            strokeWidth={1.5}\n            style={{ margin: \"0 auto 0.75rem\" }}\n          >\n            <circle cx={12} cy={12} r={10} />\n            <line x1={12} y1={8} x2={12} y2={12} />\n            <line x1={12} y1={16} x2={12.01} y2={16} />\n          </svg>\n          <p\n            className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n            style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            {error}\n          </p>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom)}\n            className=\"btn-primary\"\n            style={{ marginTop: \"0.75rem\" }}\n          >\n            Try again\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      ) : listings.length === 0 ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          {hasActiveFilters ? (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No matching reading groups\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Try adjusting your search or filters to find more groups.\n              </p>\n              <button onClick={clearFilters} className=\"btn-secondary\">\n                Clear filters\n              </button>\n            </>\n          ) : (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No reading groups yet\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Be the first to create a reading group and find your book\n                companions.\n              </p>\n              <Link href=\"/listings/create\" className=\"btn-primary\">\n                Create the first listing\n              </Link>\n            </>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      ) : (\n        <>\n          <p\n            className=\"mb-3 text-sm\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            {totalResults} open group{totalResults !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}\n            {hasActiveFilters ? \" found\" : \"\"}\n            {totalPages > 1 ? ` · Page ${page} of ${totalPages}` : \"\"}\n          </p>\n          <div className=\"grid gap-4\" role=\"list\" aria-label=\"Reading groups\">\n            {listings.map((listing) => (\n              <Link\n                key={listing.id}\n                href={`/listings/${listing.id}`}\n                className=\"card hover:shadow-md transition-shadow flex gap-4\"\n                role=\"listitem\"\n              >\n                <BookCover\n                  src={listing.book_cover_url}\n                  alt={listing.book_title}\n                  width={64}\n                  height={96}\n                  className=\"w-16 h-24 object-cover rounded\"\n                  style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n                />\n\n                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                  <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold truncate\">\n                    {listing.book_title}\n                  </h3>\n                  <p\n                    className=\"text-sm mb-2 truncate\"\n                    style={{\n                      color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    }}\n                  >\n                    by {listing.book_author} · posted by {listing.author_name}\n                  </p>\n\n                  <div\n                    className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2\"\n                    style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                  >\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {listing.reading_pace}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Starts{\" \"}\n                      {new Date(listing.start_date).toLocaleDateString(\n                        \"en-US\",\n                        {\n                          month: \"short\",\n                          day: \"numeric\",\n                        }\n                      )}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {listing.member_count}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n                    </span>\n                    {listing.requires_approval ? (\n                      <span\n                        className=\"badge\"\n                        style={{\n                          backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.08)\",\n                          color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        Approval required\n                      </span>\n                    ) : null}\n                    {listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? (\n                      <span\n                        className=\"badge\"\n                        style={{\n                          backgroundColor: \"rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.08)\",\n                          color: \"#5865F2\",\n                          display: \"inline-flex\",\n                          alignItems: \"center\",\n                          gap: \"0.25rem\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        <svg width=\"10\" height=\"10\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                          <path d=\"M20.317 4.3698a19.7913 19.7913             </div>\n                </div>\n              </Link>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n\n          {/* Pagination controls */}\n          {totalPages > 1 && (\n            <nav\n              className=\"flex justify-center items-center gap-2 mt-8\"\n              aria-label=\"Pagination\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <button\n                onClick={() => handlePageChange(page - 1)}\n                disabled={page <= 1}\n                className=\"btn-secondary\"\n                style={{\n                  fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n                  padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\",\n                  opacity: page <= 1 ? 0.5 : 1,\n                  cursor: page <= 1 ? \"not-allowed\" : \"pointer\",\n                }}\n                aria-label=\"Previous page\"\n              >\n                Previous\n              </button>\n              <span\n                className=\"text-sm\"\n string;\n  discord_link: string;\n}\n\nexport default function ListingDetail() {\n  const { id } = useParams();\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [listing, setListing] = useState<Listing | number>>({});\n  const [ratingComments, setRatingComments] = useState<Record<number, string>>({});\n  const [ratingSaving, setRatingSaving] = useState<number | null>(null);\n  const [ratingMessage, setRatingMessage] = useState(\"\");\n\n  const [notAvailable, setNotAvailable] = useState(false);\n\n  const [fetchError, setFetchError] = useState(false);\n  const [showDeleteConfirm, setShowDeleteConfirm] = useState(false);\n  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false);\n\n  const fetchListing = useCallback(async () => {\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (res.ok && data.listing) {\n        setListing(data.listing);\n        setTelegramLink(data.listing.telegram_link || \"\");\n        setDiscordLink(data.listing.discord_link || \"\");\n      } else if (res.status === 404) {\n        setNotAvailable(true);\n      } else {\n        setFetchError(true);\n      }\n    } catch {\n      setFetchError(true);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }, [id]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListing();\n  }, [fetchListing]);\n\n  const handleDelete = async () => {\n    setDeleting(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (res.ok) {\n        router.push(\"/\");\n      } else {\n        setError(data.error || \"Failed to delete listing\");\n        setShowDeleteConfirm(false);\n      }\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Something went wrong. Please try again.\");\n      setShowDeleteConfirm(false);\n    } finally {\n      setDeleting(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const fetchRatings = useCallback(async () => {\n    if (!id) return;\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/ratings?listingId=${id}`);\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (data.givenRatings) {\n        const given: Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }> = {};\n        const scores: Record<number, number> = {};\n        const comments: Record<number, string> = {};\n        for (const r of data.givenRatings) {\n          given[r.rated_user_id] = { score: r.score, comment: r.comment };\n          scores[r.rated_user_id] = r.score;\n          comments[r.rated_user_id] = r.comment;\n        }\n        setGivenRatings(given);\n        setRatingScores(scores);\n        setRatingComments(comments);\n      }\n    } catch {\n      // Silently fail — ratings are not critical\n    }\n  }, [id]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (listing?.is_full && listing?.isMember) {\n      fetchRatings();\n    }\n  }, [listing?.is_full, listing?.isMember, fetchRatings]);\n\n  const handleRatingSubmit = async (memberId: number) => {\n    const score = ratingScores[memberId];\n    if (!score) return;\n    setRatingSaving(memberId);\n    setRatingMessage(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(\"/api/ratings\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          listingId: parseInt(id as string, 10),\n          ratedUserId: memberId,\n          score,\n          comment: ratingComments[memberId] || \"\",\n        }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setRatingMessage(data.error || \"Failed to submit rating\");\n      } else {\n        setRatingMessage(\"Rating saved!\");\n        setGivenRatings((prev) => ({\n          ...prev,\n          [memberId]: { score, comment: ratingComments[memberId] || \"\" },\n        }));\n      }\n    } catch {\n      setRatingMessage(\"Failed to submit rating\");\n    } finally {\n      setRatingSaving(null);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleJoin = async () => {\n    setJoining(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to join. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setJoining(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleApply = async () => {\n    setApplying(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/apply`, { method: \"POST\" });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to apply. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setApplying(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleDecision = async (applicationId: number, action: \"approve\" | \"reject\") => {\n    setDecidingId(applicationId);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/applications`, {\n        method: \"PATCH\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ applicationId, action }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to process application. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setDecidingId(null);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const isValidTelegramLink = (link: string) => {\n    return /^https:\\/\\/t\\.me\\/[\\w+/]+$/.test(link.trim());\n  };\n\n  const telegramLinkError = telegramLink && !isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)\n    ? \"Link must start with https://t.me/ (e.g., https://t.me/+AbCdEfGhIjK)\"\n    : \"\";\n\n  const handleTelegramSave = async () => {\n    if (!isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)) return;\n    setTelegramSaving(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/telegram`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ telegramLink: telegramLink.trim() }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setTelegramSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleAutoTelegram = async () => {\n    setAutoTelegramLoading(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/auto-telegram`);\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error || \"Failed to generate Telegram link\");\n        return;\n      }\n      setAutoTelegramLink(data.deepLink);\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to connect. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setAutoTelegramLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const isValidDiscordLink = (link: string) => {\n    return /^https:\\/\\/(discord\\.gg|discord\\.com\\/invite)\\/[\\w-]+$/.test(link.trim());\n  };\n\n  const discordLinkError = discordLink && !isValidDiscordLink(discordLink)\n    ? \"Link must start with https://discord.gg/ or https://discord.com/invite/\"\n    : \"\";\n\n  const handleDiscordSave = async () => {\n    if (!isValidDiscordLink(discordLink)) return;\n    setDiscordSaving(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/discord`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ discordLink: discordLink.trim() }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setDiscordSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleAutoDiscord = async () => {\n    setAutoDiscordLoading(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/auto-discord`);\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error || \"Failed to generate Discord link\");\n        return;\n      }\n      setAutoDiscordLink(data.inviteUrl);\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to connect. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setAutoDiscordLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed (voice + text)\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (fetchError) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">Something went wrong</h2>\n        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n          Failed to load this listing. Please try again.\n        </p>\n        <button\n          onClick={() => { setFetchError(false); setLoading(true); fetchListing(); }}\n          className=\"mt-4 px-4 py-2 rounded cursor-pointer\"\n          style={{ background: \"var(--color-accent)\", color: \"white\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n        >\n          Retry\n        </button>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (notAvailable) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">This listing is no longer available</h2>\n        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n          This reading group has reached its maximum size and is no longer visible to non-members.\n        </p>\n        <button\n          onClick={() => router.push(\"/\")}\n          className=\"mt-4 px-4 py-2 rounded\"\n          style={{ background: \"var(--color-accent)\", color: \"white\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n        >\n          Browse other listings\n        </button>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">Listing not found</h2>\n        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n          This reading group may have been removed.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  const spotsLeft = listing.max_group_size - listing.memberCount;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n      {error && (\n        <div\n          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          {error}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 sm:gap-5\">\n          <BookCover\n            src={listing.book_cover_url}\n            alt={listing.book_title}\n            width={96}\n            height={144}\n            className=\"w-20 h-28 sm:w-24 sm:h-36 object-cover rounded-lg shadow-sm\"\n            style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n          />\n\n          <div className=\"flex-1\">\n            <h1 className=\"text-xl sm:text-2xl mb-1\">{listing.book_title}</h1>\n            <p\n              className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n              style={{\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              by {listing.book_author}\n            </p>\n\n            <div className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2 mb-3\">\n              {new Date(listing.start_date) < new Date(new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0]) && (\n                <span\n                  className=\"badge\"\n                  style={{\n                    backgroundColor: \"rgba(107, 114, 128, 0.1)\",\n                    color: \"#6b7280\",\n                    fontSize: \"0.7rem\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Past start date\n                </span>\n              )}\n              {listing.requires_approval ? (\n                <span\n                  className=\"badge\"\n                  style={{\n                    backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                    color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                    fontSize: \"0.7rem\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Approval required\n                </span>\n              ) : null}\n            </div>\n\n            <div\n              className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-y-2 gap-x-4 sm:gap-x-6 text-sm\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Pace\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">{listing.reading_pace}</div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Starts\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">\n                  {new Date(listing.start_date).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n                    month: \"long\",\n                    day: \"numeric\",\n                    year: \"numeric\",\n                  })}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Format\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">\n                  {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Language\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">{listing.language}</div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div\n          className=\"mt-4 sm:mt-5 pt-4 flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start sm:items-center justify-between gap-3\"\n          style={{ borderTop: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\" }}\n        >\n          <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n            <span className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">\n              {listing.memberCount}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n            </span>\n            {spotsLeft > 0 && (\n              <span\n                className=\"text-sm ml-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                ({spotsLeft} {spotsLeft === 1 ? \"spot\" : \"spots\"} left)\n              </span>\n            )}\n          </div>\n\n          {!listing.isMember && !listing.is_full && !listing.requires_approval && (\n            <button\n              className=\"btn-primary\"\n              onClick={handleJoin}\n              disabled={joining}\n            >\n              {joining ? \"Joining...\" : \"Join this group\"}\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {!listing.isMember && !listing.is_full && !!listing.requires_approval && !listing.hasApplied && (\n            <button\n              className=\"btn-primary\"\n              onClick={handleApply}\n              disabled={applying}\n            >\n              {applying ? \"Applying...\" : \"Apply to join\"}\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {!listing.isMember && listing.hasApplied && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Application pending\n            </span>\n          )}\n\n          {listing.isMember && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              You&apos;re a member\n            </span>\n          )}\n\n          {!!listing.is_full && !listing.isMember && !listing.hasApplied && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Group is full\n            </span>\n          )}\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Author actions: Edit & Delete */}\n        {listing.isAuthor && !listing.telegram_link && !listing.discord_link && (\n          <div\n            className=\"mt-4 pt-4 flex gap-3\"\n            style={{ borderTop: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\" }}\n          >\n            <button\n              className=\"flex-1 py-2 px-4 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold cursor-pointer\"\n              style={{\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                display: \"inline-flex\",\n                alignItems: \"center\",\n                justifyContent: \"center\",\n                gap: \"0.4rem\",\n                border: \"1.5px solid var(--color-accent)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                backgroundColor: \"transparent\",\n              }}\n              onClick={() => router.push(`/listings/${id}/edit`)}\n            >\n              <svg width=\"14\" height=\"14\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" strokeWidth=\"2\" strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\">\n                <path d=\"M11 4H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v14a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h14a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-7\"/>\n                <path d=\"M18.5 2.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L12 15l-4 1 1-4 9.5-9.5z\"/>\n              </svg>\n              Edit\n            </button>\n            {!showDeleteConfirm ? (\n              <button\n                className=\"py-2 px-4 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold cursor-pointer\"\n                style={{\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  display: \"inline-flex\",\n                  alignItems: \"center\",\n                  justifyContent: \"center\",\n                  gap: \"0.4rem\",\n                  border: \"1.5px solid var(--color-error)\",\n                  color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n                  backgroundColor: \"transparent\",\n                }}\n                onClick={() => setShowDeleteConfirm(true)}\n              >\n                <svg width=\"14\" height=\"14\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" strokeWidth=\"2\" strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\">\n                  <polyline points=\"3 6 5 6 21 6\"/>\n                  <path d=\"M19 6v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6m3 0V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2\"/>\n                </svg>\n                Delete\n              </button>\n            ) : (\n              <div\n                className=\"flex items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded-lg\"\n                style={{\n                  backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.06)\",\n                  border: \"1px solid rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.15)\",\n                }}\n              >\n                <span\n                  className=\"text-xs\"\n                  style={{ color: \"var(--color-error)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  Delete this group?\n                </span>\n                <button\n                  className=\"py-1 px-3 rounded text-xs font-semibold cursor-pointer\"\n                  style={{\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    backgroundColor: \"var(--color-error)\",\n                    color: \"white\",\n                    border: \"none\",\n                  }}\n                  disabled={deleting}\n                  onClick={handleDelete}\n                >\n                  {deleting ? \"Deleting...\" : \"Confirm\"}\n                </button>\n                <button\n                  className=\"py-1 px-3 rounded text-xs font-semibold cursor-pointer\"\n                  style={{\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    border: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    backgroundColor: \"transparent\",\n                  }}\n                  onClick={() => setShowDeleteConfirm(false)}\n                >\n                  Cancel\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            )}\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Chat platform section — visible to members when group is full */}\n      {!!listing.is_full && listing.isMember && listing.platform_preference !== \"discord\" && (\n        <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-2\">Telegram Group</h2>\n\n          {listing.telegram_link ? (\n            <div>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-3\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                }}\n              >\n                The reading group is full! Join the Telegram group to start\n                coordinating:\n              </p>\n              <a\n                href={listing.telegram_link}\n                target=\"_blank\"\n                rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                className=\"btn-primary inline-block\"\n                style={{ display: \"inline-flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: \"0.5rem\" }}\n              >\n                <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0 0 12-12A12 12 0 0 0 12 0a12 12 0 0 0-.056 0zm4.962 7.224c.1-.002.321.023.465.14a.506.506 0 0 1 .171.325c.016.093.036.306.02.472-.18 1.898-.962 6.502-1.36 8.627-.168.9-.499 1.201-.82 1.23-.696.065-1.225-.46-1.9-.902-1.056-.693-1.653-1.124-2.678-1.8-1.185-.78-.417-1.21.258-1.91.177-.184 3.247-2.977 3.307-3.23.007-.032.014-.15-.056-.212s-.174-.041-.249-.024c-.106.024-1.793 1.14-5.061 3.345-.479.33-.913.49-1.302.48-.428-.008-1.252-.241-1.865-.44-.752-.245-1.349-.374-1.297-.789.027-.216.325-.437.893-.663 3.498-1.524 5.83-2.529 6.998-3.014 3.332-1.386 4.025-1.627 4.476-1.635z\"/>\n                </svg>\n                Join Telegram Group\n              </a>\n              {listing.isAuthor && (\n                <p\n                  className=\"text-xs mt-3\"\n                  style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  Link shared: {listing.telegram_link}\n                </p>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          ) : listing.isAuthor ? (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Your reading group is full! Create a Telegram group and share\n                the invite link so your readers can connect.\n              </p>\n\n              {/* Auto-create option (when bot is configured) */}\n              {listing.telegramBotConfigured && !showManualFallback && (\n                <div className=\"mb-4\">\n                  {!autoTelegramLink ? (\n                    <div\n                      className=\"p-4 rounded-lg text-center\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.06)\",\n                        border: \"1px solid rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.15)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      <p className=\"text-sm mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                        Create a Telegram group with one click — the bot will\n                        automatically generate an invite link for your readers.\n                      </p>\n                      <button\n                        className=\"btn-primary\"\n                        onClick={handleAutoTelegram}\n                        disabled={autoTelegramLoading}\n                        style={{\n                          display: \"inline-flex\",\n                          alignItems: \"center\",\n                          gap: \"0.5rem\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                          <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0 0 12-12A12 12 0 0 0 12 0a12 12 0 0 0-.056 0zm4.962 7.224c.1-.002.321.023.465.14a.506.506 0 0 1 .171.325c.016.093.036.306.02.472-.18 1.898-.962 6.502-1.36 8.627-.168.9-.499 1.201-.82 1.23-.696.065-1.225-.46-1.9-.902-1.056-.693-1.653-1.124-2.678-1.8-1.185-.78-.417-1.21.258-1.91.177-.184 3.247-2.977 3.307-3.23.007-.032.014-.15-.056-.212s-.174-.041-.249-.024c-.106.024-1.793 1.14-5.061 3.345-.479.33-.913.49-1.302.48-.428-.008-1.252-.241-1.865-.44-.752-.245-1.349-.374-1.297-.789.027-.216.325-.437.893-.663 3.498-1.524 5.83-2.529 6.998-3.014 3.332-1.386 4.025-1.627 4.476-1.635z\"/>\n                        </svg>\n                        {autoTelegramLoading\n                          ? \"Generating...\"\n                          : \"Create Telegram Group Automatically\"}\n                      </button>\n                      <p className=\"text-xs mt-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                        <button\n                          className=\"underline cursor-pointer\"\n                          style={{\n                            background: \"none\",\n                            border: \"none\",\n                            color: \"inherit\",\n                            font: \"inherit\",\n                            padding: 0,\n                          }}\n                          onClick={() => setShowManualFallback(true)}\n                        >\n                          Or set up manually\n                        </button>\n                      </p>\n                    </div>\n                  ) : (\n                    <div\n                      className=\"p-4 rounded-lg\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.06)\",\n                        border: \"1px solid rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.15)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold mb-2\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-success)\" }}>\n                        Almost done! Click the link below to create the group:\n                      </p>\n                      <a\n                        href={autoTelegramLink}\n                        target=\"_blank\"\n                        rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                        className=\"btn-primary inline-block\"\n                        style={{\n                          display: \"inline-flex\",\n                          alignItems: \"center\",\n                          gap: \"0.5rem\",\n                          backgroundColor: \"var(--color-success)\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                          <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0 0 12-12A12 12 0 0 0 12 0a12 12 0 0 0-.056 0zm4.962 7.224c.1-.002.321.023.465.14a.506.506 0 0 1 .171.325c.016.093.036.306.02.472-.18 1.898-.962 6.502-1.36 8.627-.168.9-.499 1.201-.82
