window.location.reload()}\n            className=\"btn-primary\"\n          >\n            Try again\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\n\ninterface Notification {\n  id: number;\n  listing_id: number;\n  type: string;\n  message: string;\n  is_read: number;\n  created_at: string;\n  book_title: string;\n}\n\nexport default function NotificationsPage() {\n  const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState<Notification[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetch(\"/api/notifications\")\n      .then((r) => {\n        if (!r.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to load notifications\");\n        return r.json();\n      })\n      .then((data) => {\n        setNotifications(data.notifications || []);\n        // Mark all as read (fire-and-forget with silent catch)\n        fetch(\"/api/notifications\", {\n          method: \"PATCH\",\n          headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n          body: JSON.stringify({}),\n        }).catch(() => {});\n      })\n      .catch(() => {\n        setError(\"Could not load notifications. Please try again.\");\n      })\n      .finally(() => {\n        setLoading(false);\n      });\n  }, []);\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n      <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-3xl mb-4 sm:mb-6\">Notifications</h1>\n\n      {notifications.length === 0 ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-12\">\n          <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n            No notifications yet\n          </p>\n        </div>\n      ) : (\n        <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n          {notifications.map((n) => (\n            <Link\n              key={n.id}\n              href={n.listing_id ? `/listings/${n.listing_id}` : \"#\"}\n              className=\"card block hover:shadow-sm transition-shadow\"\n              style={{\n                borderLeftWidth: \"3px\",\n                borderLeftColor: n.is_read\n                  ? \"var(--color-border)\"\n                  : \"var(--color-accent)\",\n              }}\n              aria-label={`${!n.is_read ? \"Unread: \" : \"\"}${n.message}`}\n            >\n              {!n.is_read && (\n                <span className=\"sr-only\">Unread</span>\n              )}\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm\"\n                style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n              >\n                {n.message}\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-xs mt-1\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                }}\n              >\n                {new Date(n.created_at).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n                  month: \"short\",\n                  day: \"numeric\",\n                  hour: \"numeric\",\n                  minute: \"2-digit\",\n                })}\n              </p>\n            </Link>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":49,"oldLines":6,"newStart":49,"newLines":29,"lines":["     );","   }"," ","+  if (error) {","+    return (","+      <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">","+        <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-3xl mb-4 sm:mb-6\">Notifications</h1>","+        <div className=\"text-center py-12\">","+          <p","+            className=\"text-sm mb-4\"","+            style={{ color: \"var(--color-error)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}","+            role=\"alert\"","+          >","+            {error}","+          </p>","+          <button","+            onClick={() => window.location.reload()}","+            className=\"btn-primary\"","+          >","+            Try again","+          </button>","+        </div>","+      </div>","+    );","+  }","+","   return (","     <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">","       <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-3xl mb-4 sm:mb-6\">Notifications</h1>"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"edb2a5b9-962a-43da-80eb-9f8f7e8c3722","uuid":"0eb79253-7226-4273-a22c-35171ee4a180","timestamp":"2026-03-24T06:04:51.264Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/BookSearch.tsx","oldString":"          {results.map((book, index) => (\n            <button\n              key={book.key}\n              id={`book-option-${book.key}`}\n              type=\"button\"\n              role=\"option\"\n              aria-selected={index === activeIndex}\n              onClick={() => handleSelect(book)}\n              className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 hover:bg-gray-50 flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: index === activeIndex ? \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)\" : undefined,\n              }}\n            >","newString":"          {results.map((book, index) => (\n            <div\n              key={book.key}\n              id={`book-option-${book.key}`}\n              role=\"option\"\n              aria-selected={index === activeIndex}\n              onClick={() => handleSelect(book)}\n              className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 hover:bg-gray-50 flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: index === activeIndex ? \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)\" : undefined,\n              }}\n            >","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState, useEffect, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport Image from \"next/image\";\n\ninterface BookResult {\n  key: string;\n  title: string;\n  author_name?: string[];\n  cover_i?: number;\n}\n\ninterface Props {\n  onSelect: (book: {\n    title: string;\n    author: string;\n    coverUrl: string;\n    olid: string;\n  }) => void;\n}\n\nexport default function BookSearch({ onSelect }: Props) {\n  const [query, setQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [results, setResults] = useState<BookResult[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);\n  const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n  const listboxRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n      if (\n        containerRef.current &&\n        !containerRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)\n      ) {\n        setOpen(false);\n      }\n    };\n    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (query.length < 3) {\n      setResults([]);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n\n    const controller = new AbortController();\n    abortRef.current = controller;\n\n    timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {\n      setLoading(true);\n      try {\n        const res = await fetch(\n          `https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&limit=8&fields=key,title,author_name,cover_i`,\n          { signal: controller.signal }\n        );\n        const data = await res.json();\n        setResults(data.docs || []);\n        setOpen(true);\n        setActiveIndex(-1);\n      } catch (err) {\n        if ((err as Error).name !== \"AbortError\") {\n          setResults([]);\n        }\n      } finally {\n        if (!controller.signal.aborted) {\n          setLoading(false);\n        }\n      }\n    }, 400);\n\n    return () => {\n      if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n      controller.abort();\n    };\n  }, [query]);\n\n  const handleSelect = (book: BookResult) => {\n    const olid = book.key.replace(\"/works/\", \"\");\n    onSelect({\n      title: book.title,\n      author: book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\",\n      coverUrl: book.cover_i\n        ? `https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-M.jpg`\n        : \"\",\n      olid,\n    });\n    setQuery(book.title);\n    setOpen(false);\n    setActiveIndex(-1);\n  };\n\n  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {\n    if (!open || results.length === 0) return;\n\n    switch (e.key) {\n      case \"ArrowDown\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev < results.length - 1 ? prev + 1 : 0));\n        break;\n      case \"ArrowUp\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : results.length - 1));\n        break;\n      case \"Enter\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        if (activeIndex >= 0 && activeIndex < results.length) {\n          handleSelect(results[activeIndex]);\n        }\n        break;\n      case \"Escape\":\n        setOpen(false);\n        setActiveIndex(-1);\n        break;\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Scroll active option into view\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (activeIndex >= 0 && listboxRef.current) {\n      const activeEl = listboxRef.current.children[activeIndex] as HTMLElement;\n      if (activeEl) {\n        activeEl.scrollIntoView({ block: \"nearest\" });\n      }\n    }\n  }, [activeIndex]);\n\n  const activeDescendant =\n    activeIndex >= 0 && results[activeIndex]\n      ? `book-option-${results[activeIndex].key}`\n      : undefined;\n\n  return (\n    <div ref={containerRef} className=\"relative\">\n      <input\n        type=\"text\"\n        className=\"input-field\"\n        value={query}\n        onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}\n        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}\n        placeholder=\"Search for a book title...\"\n        onFocus={() => results.length > 0 && setOpen(true)}\n        role=\"combobox\"\n        aria-expanded={open && results.length > 0}\n        aria-haspopup=\"listbox\"\n        aria-controls=\"book-search-listbox\"\n        aria-activedescendant={activeDescendant}\n        aria-label=\"Search for a book\"\n        aria-autocomplete=\"list\"\n      />\n      {loading && (\n        <div\n          className=\"absolute right-3 top-3 text-xs\"\n          style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          role=\"status\"\n          aria-live=\"polite\"\n        >\n          Searching...\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {open && results.length > 0 && (\n        <div\n          ref={listboxRef}\n          id=\"book-search-listbox\"\n          role=\"listbox\"\n          aria-label=\"Book search results\"\n          className=\"absolute z-10 w-full mt-1 card shadow-lg max-h-72 overflow-y-auto\"\n          style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 0\" }}\n        >\n          {results.map((book, index) => (\n            <button\n              key={book.key}\n              id={`book-option-${book.key}`}\n              type=\"button\"\n              role=\"option\"\n              aria-selected={index === activeIndex}\n              onClick={() => handleSelect(book)}\n              className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 hover:bg-gray-50 flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: index === activeIndex ? \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)\" : undefined,\n              }}\n            >\n              {book.cover_i ? (\n                <Image\n                  src={`https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-S.jpg`}\n                  alt={`Cover of ${book.title}`}\n                  width={32}\n                  height={48}\n                  className=\"w-8 h-12 object-cover rounded\"\n                />\n              ) : (\n                <div\n                  className=\"w-8 h-12 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-sm\"\n                  style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\" }}\n                  aria-hidden=\"true\"\n                >\n                  <span role=\"img\" aria-hidden=\"true\">📖</span>\n                </div>\n              )}\n              <div className=\"min-w-0\">\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-sm font-semibold truncate\"\n                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  {book.title}\n                </div>\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-xs truncate\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  {book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\"}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </button>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":177,"oldLines":10,"newStart":177,"newLines":9,"lines":["           style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 0\" }}","         >","           {results.map((book, index) => (","-            <button","+            <div","               key={book.key}","               id={`book-option-${book.key}`}","-              type=\"button\"","               role=\"option\"","               aria-selected={index === activeIndex}","               onClick={() => handleSelect(book)}"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"message_delta","delta":{"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null},"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":475,"cache_read_input_tokens":79519,"output_tokens":173},"context_management":{"applied_edits":[]}},"session_id":"edb2a5b9-962a-43da-80eb-9f8f7e8c3722","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"64cf875b-1b31-4928-84d5-36f189ea7380"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_016dp2Ckc68x2FditzR13eFR","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/BookSearch.tsx has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"edb2a5b9-962a-43da-80eb-9f8f7e8c3722","uuid":"5db0d9e2-1833-40b5-9957-5e1b8e11c0ce","timestamp":"2026-03-24T06:04:55.248Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/BookSearch.tsx","oldString":"            </button>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}","newString":"            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState, useEffect, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport Image from \"next/image\";\n\ninterface BookResult {\n  key: string;\n  title: string;\n  author_name?: string[];\n  cover_i?: number;\n}\n\ninterface Props {\n  onSelect: (book: {\n    title: string;\n    author: string;\n    coverUrl: string;\n    olid: string;\n  }) => void;\n}\n\nexport default function BookSearch({ onSelect }: Props) {\n  const [query, setQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [results, setResults] = useState<BookResult[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);\n  const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n  const listboxRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n      if (\n        containerRef.current &&\n        !containerRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)\n      ) {\n        setOpen(false);\n      }\n    };\n    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (query.length < 3) {\n      setResults([]);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n\n    const controller = new AbortController();\n    abortRef.current = controller;\n\n    timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {\n      setLoading(true);\n      try {\n        const res = await fetch(\n          `https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&limit=8&fields=key,title,author_name,cover_i`,\n          { signal: controller.signal }\n        );\n        const data = await res.json();\n        setResults(data.docs || []);\n        setOpen(true);\n        setActiveIndex(-1);\n      } catch (err) {\n        if ((err as Error).name !== \"AbortError\") {\n          setResults([]);\n        }\n      } finally {\n        if (!controller.signal.aborted) {\n          setLoading(false);\n        }\n      }\n    }, 400);\n\n    return () => {\n      if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n      controller.abort();\n    };\n  }, [query]);\n\n  const handleSelect = (book: BookResult) => {\n    const olid = book.key.replace(\"/works/\", \"\");\n    onSelect({\n      title: book.title,\n      author: book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\",\n      coverUrl: book.cover_i\n        ? `https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-M.jpg`\n        : \"\",\n      olid,\n    });\n    setQuery(book.title);\n    setOpen(false);\n    setActiveIndex(-1);\n  };\n\n  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {\n    if (!open || results.length === 0) return;\n\n    switch (e.key) {\n      case \"ArrowDown\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev < results.length - 1 ? prev + 1 : 0));\n        break;\n      case \"ArrowUp\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : results.length - 1));\n        break;\n      case \"Enter\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        if (activeIndex >= 0 && activeIndex < results.length) {\n          handleSelect(results[activeIndex]);\n        }\n        break;\n      case \"Escape\":\n        setOpen(false);\n        setActiveIndex(-1);\n        break;\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Scroll active option into view\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (activeIndex >= 0 && listboxRef.current) {\n      const activeEl = listboxRef.current.children[activeIndex] as HTMLElement;\n      if (activeEl) {\n        activeEl.scrollIntoView({ block: \"nearest\" });\n      }\n    }\n  }, [activeIndex]);\n\n  const activeDescendant =\n    activeIndex >= 0 && results[activeIndex]\n      ? `book-option-${results[activeIndex].key}`\n      : undefined;\n\n  return (\n    <div ref={containerRef} className=\"relative\">\n      <input\n        type=\"text\"\n        className=\"input-field\"\n        value={query}\n        onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}\n        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}\n        placeholder=\"Search for a book title...\"\n        onFocus={() => results.length > 0 && setOpen(true)}\n        role=\"combobox\"\n        aria-expanded={open && results.length > 0}\n        aria-haspopup=\"listbox\"\n        aria-controls=\"book-search-listbox\"\n        aria-activedescendant={activeDescendant}\n        aria-label=\"Search for a book\"\n        aria-autocomplete=\"list\"\n      />\n      {loading && (\n        <div\n          className=\"absolute right-3 top-3 text-xs\"\n          style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          role=\"status\"\n          aria-live=\"polite\"\n        >\n          Searching...\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {open && results.length > 0 && (\n        <div\n          ref={listboxRef}\n          id=\"book-search-listbox\"\n          role=\"listbox\"\n          aria-label=\"Book search results\"\n          className=\"absolute z-10 w-full mt-1 card shadow-lg max-h-72 overflow-y-auto\"\n          style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 0\" }}\n        >\n          {results.map((book, index) => (\n            <div\n              key={book.key}\n              id={`book-option-${book.key}`}\n              role=\"option\"\n              aria-selected={index === activeIndex}\n              onClick={() => handleSelect(book)}\n              className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 hover:bg-gray-50 flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: index === activeIndex ? \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)\" : undefined,\n              }}\n            >\n              {book.cover_i ? (\n                <Image\n                  src={`https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-S.jpg`}\n                  alt={`Cover of ${book.title}`}\n                  width={32}\n                  height={48}\n                  className=\"w-8 h-12 object-cover rounded\"\n                />\n              ) : (\n                <div\n                  className=\"w-8 h-12 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-sm\"\n                  style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\" }}\n                  aria-hidden=\"true\"\n                >\n                  <span role=\"img\" aria-hidden=\"true\">📖</span>\n                </div>\n              )}\n              <div className=\"min-w-0\">\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-sm font-semibold truncate\"\n                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  {book.title}\n                </div>\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-xs truncate\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  {book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\"}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </button>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":222,"oldLines":7,"newStart":222,"newLines":7,"lines":["                   {book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\"}","                 </div>","               </div>","-            </button>","+            </div>","           ))}","         </div>","       )}"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"edb2a5b9-962a-43da-80eb-9f8f7e8c3722","uuid":"a7c3f194-ad7c-4eeb-b734-f2b659f90a27","timestamp":"2026-03-24T06:04:59.973Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/[id]/edit/page.tsx","oldString":"  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [fetching, setFetching] = useState(true);","newString":"  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [fetching, setFetching] = useState(true);\n  const [fetchFailed, setFetchFailed] = useState(false);","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport Image from \"next/image\";\n\nexport default function EditListingPage() {\n  const { id } = useParams();\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [fetching, setFetching] = useState(true);\n\n  const [bookTitle, setBookTitle] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookAuthor, setBookAuthor] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookCoverUrl, setBookCoverUrl] = useState(\"\");\n  const [language, setLanguage] = useState(\"English\");\n  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(\"\");\n  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"text\");\n  const [maxGroupSize, setMaxGroupSize] = useState(\"4\");\n  const [requiresApproval, setRequiresApproval] = useState(false);\n  const [platformPreference, setPlatformPreference] = useState(\"telegram\");\n  const [memberCount, setMemberCount] = useState(1);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    async function fetchListing() {\n      try {\n        const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n        const data = await res.json();\n        if (res.ok && data.listing) {\n          const l = data.listing;\n          if (!l.isAuthor) {\n            router.push(`/listings/${id}`);\n            return;\n          }\n          // Cannot edit if platform link shared\n          if (l.telegram_link || l.discord_link) {\n            router.push(`/listings/${id}`);\n            return;\n          }\n          setBookTitle(l.book_title);\n          setBookAuthor(l.book_author);\n          setBookCoverUrl(l.book_cover_url || \"\");\n          setLanguage(l.language || \"English\");\n          setReadingPace(l.reading_pace || \"\");\n          setStartDate(l.start_date || \"\");\n          setMeetingFormat(l.meeting_format || \"text\");\n          setMaxGroupSize(String(l.max_group_size || 4));\n          setRequiresApproval(!!l.requires_approval);\n          setPlatformPreference(l.platform_preference || \"telegram\");\n          setMemberCount(l.memberCount || 1);\n        } else if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n        } else {\n          setError(\"Listing not found\");\n        }\n      } catch {\n        setError(\"Failed to load listing\");\n      } finally {\n        setFetching(false);\n      }\n    }\n    fetchListing();\n  }, [id, router]);\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setError(\"\");\n    setLoading(true);\n\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`, {\n        method: \"PATCH\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          language,\n          readingPace,\n          startDate,\n          meetingFormat,\n          maxGroupSize,\n          requiresApproval,\n          platformPreference,\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const data = await res.json();\n\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error || \"Failed to update listing\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      router.push(`/listings/${id}`);\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Something went wrong. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  if (fetching) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"max-w-lg mx-auto\">\n        <div className=\"animate-pulse space-y-4\">\n          <div className=\"h-8 bg-gray-200 rounded w-2/3\" />\n          <div className=\"h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded w-1/2\" />\n          <div className=\"h-40 bg-gray-200 rounded\" />\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Filter group size options: only allow sizes >= current member count\n  const groupSizeOptions = [2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 10, 15, 20].filter(\n    (n) => n >= memberCount\n  );\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-lg mx-auto\">\n      <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-3xl mb-2\">Edit reading group</h1>\n      <p\n        className=\"mb-6 sm:mb-8\"\n        style={{\n          color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n          fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n        }}\n      >\n        Update your group settings. Book title and author cannot be changed.\n      </p>\n\n      {error && (\n        <div\n          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n          role=\"alert\"\n        >\n          {error}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Book info (read-only) */}\n      <div\n        className=\"mb-6 flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-lg\"\n        style={{\n          backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.06)\",\n          border: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\",\n        }}\n      >\n        {bookCoverUrl && (\n          <Image\n            src={bookCoverUrl}\n            alt={`Cover of ${bookTitle}`}\n            width={48}\n            height={68}\n            className=\"w-12 h-17 object-cover rounded\"\n            unoptimized\n          />\n        )}\n        <div>\n          <div\n            className=\"text-sm font-semibold\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            {bookTitle}\n          </div>\n          <div\n            className=\"text-xs\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            by {bookAuthor}\n          </div>\n          <div\n            className=\"text-xs mt-1\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              fontStyle: \"italic\",\n            }}\n          >\n            Book cannot be changed\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"space-y-5\">\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Discussion language\n          </label>\n          <select\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={language}\n            onChange={(e) => setLanguage(e.target.value)}\n          >\n            <option>English</option>\n            <option>Spanish</option>\n            <option>French</option>\n            <option>German</option>\n            <option>Russian</option>\n            <option>Portuguese</option>\n            <option>Italian</option>\n            <option>Japanese</option>\n            <option>Chinese</option>\n            <option>Korean</option>\n            <option>Other</option>\n          </select>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Reading pace\n          </label>\n          <input\n            type=\"text\"\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={readingPace}\n            onChange={(e) => setReadingPace(e.target.value)}\n            required\n            placeholder='e.g. \"1 chapter per week\" or \"50 pages per day\"'\n          />\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Start date\n          </label>\n          <input\n            type=\"date\"\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={startDate}\n            onChange={(e) => setStartDate(e.target.value)}\n            required\n          />\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Meeting format\n          </label>\n          <div className=\"flex gap-3\" role=\"radiogroup\" aria-label=\"Meeting format\">\n            {[\n              { value: \"text\", label: \"Text chat\" },\n              { value: \"voice\", label: \"Voice calls\" },\n              { value: \"mixed\", label: \"Mixed\" },\n            ].map((opt) => (\n              <button\n                key={opt.value}\n                type=\"button\"\n                role=\"radio\"\n                aria-checked={meetingFormat === opt.value}\n                onClick={() => setMeetingFormat(opt.value)}\n                className=\"flex-1 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold transition-colors cursor-pointer\"\n                style={{\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  backgroundColor:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"transparent\",\n                  color:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"white\"\n                      : \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  border:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"1.5px solid var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                }}\n              >\n                {opt.label}\n              </button>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Maximum group size\n          </label>\n          {memberCount > 1 && (\n            <p\n              className=\"text-xs mb-1\"\n              style={{\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Cannot be less than current member count ({memberCount})\n            </p>\n          )}\n          <select\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={maxGroupSize}\n            onChange={(e) => setMaxGroupSize(e.target.value)}\n          >\n            {groupSizeOptions.map((n) => (\n              <option key={n} value={n}>\n                {n} readers\n              </option>\n            ))}\n          </select>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Chat platform\n          </label>\n          <p\n            className=\"text-xs mb-2\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            Where your group will connect once it&apos;s full\n          </p>\n          <div className=\"flex gap-3\" role=\"radiogroup\" aria-label=\"Chat platform\">\n            {[\n              { value: \"telegram\", label: \"Telegram\", icon: (\n                <svg width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0           </svg>\n              )},\n            ].map((opt) => (\n              <button\n                key={opt.value}\n                type=\"button\"\n                role=\"radio\"\n                aria-checked={platformPreference === opt.value}\n                onClick={() => setPlatformPreference(opt.value)}\n                className=\"flex-1 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold \"center\",\n                  justifyContent: \"center\",\n                  gap: \"0.4rem\",\n                  backgroundColor:\n                    platformPreference === opt.value\n                      ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"transparent\",\n                  color:\n                    platformPreference === opt.value\n                      ? \"white\"\n                      : \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  border:\n                    platformPreference === opt.value\n                      ? \"1.5px solid var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                }}\n              >\n                {opt.icon}\n                {opt.label}\n              </button>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div\n          className=\"flex items-start gap-3 p-4 rounded-lg cursor-pointer\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: requiresApproval\n              ? \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.06)\"\n              : \"transparent\",\n            border: requiresApproval\n              ? \"1.5px solid var(--color-accent)\"\n              : \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n          }}\n          role=\"checkbox\"\n          aria-checked={requiresApproval}\n          aria-label=\"Require approval for new members\"\n          tabIndex={0}\n          onClick={() => setRequiresApproval(!requiresApproval)}\n          onKeyDown={(e) => {\n            if (e.key === \" \" || e.key === \"Enter\") {\n              e.preventDefault();\n              setRequiresApproval(!requiresApproval);\n            }\n          }}\n        >\n          <div\n            className=\"w-5 h-5 rounded flex items-center justify-center mt-0.5\"\n            style={{\n              flexShrink: 0,\n              backgroundColor: requiresApproval\n                ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                : \"transparent\",\n              border: requiresApproval\n                ? \"none\"\n                : \"2px solid var(--color-border)\",\n            }}\n          >\n            {requiresApproval && (\n              <svg width=\"12\" height=\"12\" viewBox=\"0 0 12 12\" fill=\"white\">\n                <path d=\"M10 3L4.5 8.5L2 6\" stroke=\"white\" strokeWidth=\"2\" fill=\"none\" strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\"/>\n              </svg>\n            )}\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <div\n              className=\"text-sm font-semibold\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              Require approval for new members\n            </div>\n            <div\n              className=\"text-xs mt-0.5\"\n              style={{\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Members must be approved by you before joining the group.\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex gap-3\">\n          <button\n            type=\"button\"\n            className=\"flex-1 py-2.5 px-4 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold cursor-pointer\"\n            style={{\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              border: \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              backgroundColor: \"transparent\",\n            }}\n            onClick={() => router.push(`/listings/${id}`)}\n          >\n            Cancel\n          </button>\n          <button\n            type=\"submit\"\n            className=\"btn-primary flex-1\"\n            disabled={loading}\n          >\n            {loading ? \"Saving...\" :        } else if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n        } else {\n          setError(\"Listing not found\");\n        }\n      } catch {\n        setError(\"Failed to load listing\");","newString":"        } else if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n        } else {\n          setError(\"Listing not found\");\n          setFetchFailed(true);\n        }\n      } catch {\n        setError(\"Failed to load listing\");\n        setFetchFailed(true);","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport Image from \"next/image\";\n\nexport default function EditListingPage() {\n  const { id } = useParams();\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [fetching, setFetching] = useState(true);\n  const [fetchFailed, setFetchFailed] = useState(false);\n\n  const [bookTitle, setBookTitle] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookAuthor, setBookAuthor] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookCoverUrl, setBookCoverUrl] = useState(\"\");\n  const [language, setLanguage] = useState(\"English\");\n  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(\"\");\n  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"text\");\n  const [maxGroupSize, setMaxGroupSize] = useState(\"4\");\n  const [requiresApproval, setRequiresApproval] = useState(false);\n  const [platformPreference, setPlatformPreference] = useState(\"telegram\");\n  const [memberCount, setMemberCount] = useState(1);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    async function fetchListing() {\n      try {\n        const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n        const data = await res.json();\n        if (res.ok && data.listing) {\n          const l = data.listing;\n          if (!l.isAuthor) {\n            router.push(`/listings/${id}`);\n            return;\n          }\n          // Cannot edit if platform link shared\n          if (l.telegram_link || l.discord_link) {\n            router.push(`/listings/${id}`);\n            return;\n          }\n          setBookTitle(l.book_title);\n          setBookAuthor(l.book_author);\n          setBookCoverUrl(l.book_cover_url || \"\");\n          setLanguage(l.language || \"English\");\n          setReadingPace(l.reading_pace || \"\");\n          setStartDate(l.start_date || \"\");\n          setMeetingFormat(l.meeting_format || \"text\");\n          setMaxGroupSize(String(l.max_group_size || 4));\n          setRequiresApproval(!!l.requires_approval);\n          setPlatformPreference(l.platform_preference || \"telegram\");\n          setMemberCount(l.memberCount || 1);\n        } else if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n        } else {\n          setError(\"Listing not found\");\n        }\n      } catch {\n        setError(\"Failed to load listing\");\n      } finally {\n        setFetching(false);\n      }\n    }\n    fetchListing();\n  }, [id, router]);\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setError(\"\");\n    setLoading(true);\n\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`, {\n        method: \"PATCH\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          language,\n          readingPace,\n          startDate,\n          meetingFormat,\n          maxGroupSize,\n          requiresApproval,\n          platformPreference,\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const data = await res.json();\n\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error || \"Failed to update listing\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      router.push(`/listings/${id}`);\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Something went wrong. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  if (fetching) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"max-w-lg mx-auto\">\n        <div className=\"animate-pulse space-y-4\">\n          <div className=\"h-8 bg-gray-200 rounded w-2/3\" />\n          <div className=\"h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded w-1/2\" />\n          <div className=\"h-40 bg-gray-200 rounded\" />\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Filter group size options: only allow sizes >= current member count\n  const groupSizeOptions = [2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 10, 15, 20].filter(\n    (n) => n >= memberCount\n  );\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-lg mx-auto\">\n      <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-3xl mb-2\">Edit reading group</h1>\n      <p\n        className=\"mb-6 sm:mb-8\"\n        style={{\n          color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n          fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n        }}\n      >\n        Update your group settings. Book title and author cannot be changed.\n      </p>\n\n      {error && (\n        <div\n          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n          role=\"alert\"\n        >\n          {error}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Book info (read-only) */}\n      <div\n        className=\"mb-6 flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-lg\"\n        style={{\n          backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.06)\",\n          border: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\",\n        }}\n      >\n        {bookCoverUrl && (\n          <Image\n            src={bookCoverUrl}\n            alt={`Cover of ${bookTitle}`}\n            width={48}\n            height={68}\n            className=\"w-12 h-17 object-cover rounded\"\n            unoptimized\n          />\n        )}\n        <div>\n          <div\n            className=\"text-sm font-semibold\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            {bookTitle}\n          </div>\n          <div\n            className=\"text-xs\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            by {bookAuthor}\n          </div>\n          <div\n            className=\"text-xs mt-1\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              fontStyle: \"italic\",\n            }}\n          >\n            Book cannot be changed\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"space-y-5\">\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Discussion language\n          </label>\n          <select\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={language}\n            onChange={(e) => setLanguage(e.target.value)}\n          >\n            <option>English</option>\n            <option>Spanish</option>\n            <option>French</option>\n            <option>German</option>\n            <option>Russian</option>\n            <option>Portuguese</option>\n            <option>Italian</option>\n            <option>Japanese</option>\n            <option>Chinese</option>\n            <option>Korean</option>\n            <option>Other</option>\n          </select>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Reading pace\n          </label>\n          <input\n            type=\"text\"\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={readingPace}\n            onChange={(e) => setReadingPace(e.target.value)}\n            required\n            placeholder='e.g. \"1 chapter per week\" or \"50 pages per day\"'\n          />\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Start date\n          </label>\n          <input\n            type=\"date\"\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={startDate}\n            onChange={(e) => setStartDate(e.target.value)}\n            required\n          />\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Meeting format\n          </label>\n          <div className=\"flex gap-3\" role=\"radiogroup\" aria-label=\"Meeting format\">\n            {[\n              { value: \"text\", label: \"Text chat\" },\n              { value: \"voice\", label: \"Voice calls\" },\n              { value: \"mixed\", label: \"Mixed\" },\n            ].map((opt) => (\n              <button\n                key={opt.value}\n                type=\"button\"\n                role=\"radio\"\n                aria-checked={meetingFormat === opt.value}\n                onClick={() => setMeetingFormat(opt.value)}\n                className=\"flex-1 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold transition-colors cursor-pointer\"\n                style={{\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  backgroundColor:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"transparent\",\n                  color:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"white\"\n                      : \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  border:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"1.5px solid var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                }}\n              >\n                {opt.label}\n              </button>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Maximum group size\n          </label>\n          {memberCount > 1 && (\n            <p\n              className=\"text-xs mb-1\"\n              style={{\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Cannot be less than current member count ({memberCount})\n            </p>\n          )}\n          <select\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={maxGroupSize}\n            onChange={(e) => setMaxGroupSize(e.target.value)}\n          >\n            {groupSizeOptions.map((n) => (\n              <option key={n} value={n}>\n                {n} readers\n              </option>\n            ))}\n          </select>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Chat platform\n          </label>\n          <p\n            className=\"text-xs mb-2\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            Where your group will connect once it&apos;s full\n          </p>\n          <div className=\"flex gap-3\" role=\"radiogroup\" aria-label=\"Chat platform\">\n            {[\n              { value: \"telegram\", label: \"Telegram\", icon: (\n                <svg width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0           </svg>\n              )},\n            ].map((opt) => (\n              <button\n                key={opt.value}\n                type=\"button\"\n                role=\"radio\"\n                aria-checked={platformPreference === opt.value}\n                onClick={() => setPlatformPreference(opt.value)}\n                className=\"flex-1 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold transition-colors cursor-pointer\"\n                style={{\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  display: \"flex\",\n                  alignItems: \"center\",\n                  justifyContent: \"center\",\n                  gap: \"0.4rem\",\n                  backgroundColor:\n                    platformPreference === opt.value\n                      ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"transparent\",\n                  color:\n                    platformPreference === opt.value\n                      ? \"white\"\n                      : \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  border:\n                    platformPreference === opt.value\n                      ? \"1.5px solid var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                }}\n              >\n                {opt.icon}\n                {opt.label}\n              </button>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div\n          className=\"flex items-start gap-3 p-4 rounded-lg cursor-pointer\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: requiresApproval\n              ? \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.06)\"\n              : \"transparent\",\n            border: requiresApproval\n              ? \"1.5px solid var(--color-accent)\"\n              : \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n          }}\n          role=\"checkbox\"\n          aria-checked={requiresApproval}\n          aria-label=\"Require approval for new members\"\n          tabIndex={0}\n          onClick={() => setRequiresApproval(!requiresApproval)}\n          onKeyDown={(e) => {\n            if (e.key === \" \" || e.key === \"Enter\") {\n              e.preventDefault();\n              setRequiresApproval(!requiresApproval);\n            }\n          }}\n        >\n          <div\n            className=\"w-5 h-5 rounded flex items-center justify-center mt-0.5\"\n            style={{\n              flexShrink: 0,\n              backgroundColor: requiresApproval\n                ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                : \"transparent\",\n              border: requiresApproval\n                ? \"none\"\n                : \"2px solid var(--color-border)\",\n            }}\n          >\n            {requiresApproval && (\n              <svg width=\"12\" height=\"12\" viewBox=\"0 0 12 12\" fill=\"white\">\n                <path d=\"M10 3L4.5 8.5L2 6\" stroke=\"white\" strokeWidth=\"2\" fill=\"none\" strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\"/>\n              </svg>\n            )}\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <div\n              className=\"text-sm font-semibold\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              Require approval for new members\n            </div>\n            <div\n              className=\"text-xs mt-0.5\"\n              style={{\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Members must be approved by you before joining the group.\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex gap-3\">\n          <button\n            type=\"button\"\n            className=\"flex-1 py-2.5 px-4 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold cursor-pointer\"\n            style={{\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              border: \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              backgroundColor: \"transparent\",\n            }}\n            onClick={() => router.push(`/listings/${id}`)}\n          >\n            Cancel\n          </button>\n          <button\n            type=\"submit\"\n            className=\"btn-primary flex-1\"\n            disabled={loading}\n          >\n            {loading ? \"Saving...\" : \"Save changes\"}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </form>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":55,"oldLines":9,"newStart":55,"newLines":11,"lines":["           router.push(\"/auth/login\");","         } else {","           setError(\"Listing not found\");","+          setFetchFailed(true);","         }","       } catch {","         setError(\"Failed to load listing\");","+        setFetchFailed(true);","       } finally {","         setFetching(false);","       }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

 // Filter group size options: only allow sizes >= current member count\n  const groupSizeOptions = [2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 10, 15, 20].filter(\n    (n) => n >= memberCount\n  );\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-lg mx-auto\">\n      <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-3xl mb-2\">Edit reading group</h1>","newString":"  // Filter group size options: only allow sizes >= current member count\n  const groupSizeOptions = [2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 10, 15, 20].filter(\n    (n) => n >= memberCount\n  );\n\n  // Don't render the form if the fetch failed — prevents submitting default values\n  if (fetchFailed) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"max-w-lg mx-auto\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-3xl mb-2\">Edit reading group</h1>\n        <div\n          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n          role=\"alert\"\n        >\n          {error}\n        </div>\n        <button\n          className=\"btn-secondary\"\n          onClick={() => router.push(`/listings/${id}`)}\n        >\n          Back to listing\n        </button>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-lg mx-auto\">\n      <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-3xl mb-2\">Edit reading group</h1>","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport Image from \"next/image\";\n\nexport default function EditListingPage() {\n  const { id } = useParams();\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [fetching, setFetching] = useState(true);\n  const [fetchFailed, setFetchFailed] = useState(false);\n\n  const [bookTitle, setBookTitle] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookAuthor, setBookAuthor] = useState(\"\");\n  const [bookCoverUrl, setBookCoverUrl] = useState(\"\");\n  const [language, setLanguage] = useState(\"English\");\n  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(\"\");\n  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"text\");\n  const [maxGroupSize, setMaxGroupSize] = useState(\"4\");\n  const [requiresApproval, setRequiresApproval] = useState(false);\n  const [platformPreference, setPlatformPreference] = useState(\"telegram\");\n  const [memberCount, setMemberCount] = useState(1);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    async function fetchListing() {\n      try {\n        const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n        const data = await res.json();\n        if (res.ok && data.listing) {\n          const l = data.listing;\n          if (!l.isAuthor) {\n            router.push(`/listings/${id}`);\n            return;\n          }\n          // Cannot edit if platform link shared\n          if (l.telegram_link || l.discord_link) {\n            router.push(`/listings/${id}`);\n            return;\n          }\n          setBookTitle(l.book_title);\n          setBookAuthor(l.book_author);\n          setBookCoverUrl(l.book_cover_url || \"\");\n          setLanguage(l.language || \"English\");\n          setReadingPace(l.reading_pace || \"\");\n          setStartDate(l.start_date || \"\");\n          setMeetingFormat(l.meeting_format || \"text\");\n          setMaxGroupSize(String(l.max_group_size || 4));\n          setRequiresApproval(!!l.requires_approval);\n          setPlatformPreference(l.platform_preference || \"telegram\");\n          setMemberCount(l.memberCount || 1);\n        } else if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n        } else {\n          setError(\"Listing not found\");\n          setFetchFailed(true);\n        }\n      } catch {\n        setError(\"Failed to load listing\");\n        setFetchFailed(true);\n      } finally {\n        setFetching(false);\n      }\n    }\n    fetchListing();\n  }, [id, router]);\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setError(\"\");\n    setLoading(true);\n\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`, {\n        method: \"PATCH\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          language,\n          readingPace,\n          startDate,\n          meetingFormat,\n          maxGroupSize,\n          requiresApproval,\n          platformPreference,\n        }),\n      });\n\n      const data = await res.json();\n\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error || \"Failed to update listing\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      router.push(`/listings/${id}`);\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Something went wrong. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  if (fetching) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"max-w-lg mx-auto\">\n        <div className=\"animate-pulse space-y-4\">\n          <div className=\"h-8 bg-gray-200 rounded w-2/3\" />\n          <div className=\"h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded w-1/2\" />\n          <div className=\"h-40 bg-gray-200 rounded\" />\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Filter group size options: only allow sizes >= current member count\n  const groupSizeOptions = [2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 10, 15, 20].filter(\n    (n) => n >= memberCount\n  );\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-lg mx-auto\">\n      <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-3xl mb-2\">Edit reading group</h1>\n      <p\n        className=\"mb-6 sm:mb-8\"\n        style={{\n          color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n          fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n        }}\n      >\n        Update your group settings. Book title and author cannot be changed.\n      </p>\n\n      {error && (\n        <div\n          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n          role=\"alert\"\n        >\n          {error}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Book info (read-only) */}\n      <div\n        className=\"mb-6 flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-lg\"\n        style={{\n          backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.06)\",\n          border: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\",\n        }}\n      >\n        {bookCoverUrl && (\n          <Image\n            src={bookCoverUrl}\n            alt={`Cover of ${bookTitle}`}\n            width={48}\n            height={68}\n            className=\"w-12 h-17 object-cover rounded\"\n            unoptimized\n          />\n        )}\n        <div>\n          <div\n            className=\"text-sm font-semibold\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            {bookTitle}\n          </div>\n          <div\n            className=\"text-xs\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            by {bookAuthor}\n          </div>\n          <div\n            className=\"text-xs mt-1\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              fontStyle: \"italic\",\n            }}\n          >\n            Book cannot be changed\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"space-y-5\">\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Discussion language\n          </label>\n          <select\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={language}\n            onChange={(e) => setLanguage(e.target.value)}\n          >\n            <option>English</option>\n            <option>Spanish</option>\n            <option>French</option>\n            <option>German</option>\n            <option>Russian</option>\n            <option>Portuguese</option>\n            <option>Italian</option>\n            <option>Japanese</option>\n            <option>Chinese</option>\n            <option>Korean</option>\n            <option>Other</option>\n          </select>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Reading pace\n          </label>\n          <input\n            type=\"text\"\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={readingPace}\n            onChange={(e) => setReadingPace(e.target.value)}\n            required\n            placeholder='e.g. \"1 chapter per week\" or \"50 pages per day\"'\n          />\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Start date\n          </label>\n          <input\n            type=\"date\"\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={startDate}\n            onChange={(e) => setStartDate(e.target.value)}\n            required\n          />\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Meeting format\n          </label>\n          <div className=\"flex gap-3\" role=\"radiogroup\" aria-label=\"Meeting format\">\n            {[\n              { value: \"text\", label: \"Text chat\" },\n              { value: \"voice\", label: \"Voice calls\" },\n              { value: \"mixed\", label: \"Mixed\" },\n            ].map((opt) => (\n              <button\n                key={opt.value}\n                type=\"button\"\n                role=\"radio\"\n                aria-checked={meetingFormat === opt.value}\n                onClick={() => setMeetingFormat(opt.value)}\n                className=\"flex-1 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold transition-colors cursor-pointer\"\n                style={{\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  backgroundColor:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"transparent\",\n                  color:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"white\"\n                      : \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  border:\n                    meetingFormat === opt.value\n                      ? \"1.5px solid var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                }}\n              >\n                {opt.label}\n              </button>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Maximum group size\n          </label>\n          {memberCount > 1 && (\n            <p\n              className=\"text-xs mb-1\"\n              style={{\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Cannot be less than current member count ({memberCount})\n            </p>\n          )}\n          <select\n            className=\"input-field\"\n            value={maxGroupSize}\n            onChange={(e) => setMaxGroupSize(e.target.value)}\n          >\n            {groupSizeOptions.map((n) => (\n              <option key={n} value={n}>\n                {n} readers\n              </option>\n            ))}\n          </select>\n        </div>\n\n        <div>\n          <label\n            className=\"block text-sm font-semibold mb-1\"\n            style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            Chat platform\n          </label>\n          <p\n            className=\"text-xs mb-2\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            Where your group will connect once it&apos;s full\n          </p>\n          <div className=\"flex gap-3\" role=\"radiogroup\" aria-label=\"Chat platform\">\n            {[\n              { value: \"telegram\", label: \"Telegram\", icon: (\n                <svg width=\"16\" height=\"16\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0 0 12-12A12 12 0 0 0 12 0a12 12 0 0 0-.056 0zm4.962 7.224c.1-.002.321.023.465.14a.506.506 0 0 1 .171.325c.016.093.036.306.02.472-.18 1.898-.962 6.502-1.36 8.627-.168.9-.499 1.201-.82 1.23-.696.065-1.225-.46-1.9-.902-1.056-.693-1.653-1.124-2.678-1.8-1.185-.78-.417-1.21.258-1.91.177-.184 3.247-2.977 3.307-3.23.007-.032.014-.15-.056-.212s-.174-.041-.249-.024c-.106.024-1.793 1.14-5.061 3.345-.479.33-.913.49-1.302.48-.428-.008-1.252-.241-1.865-.44-.752-.245-1.349-.374-1.297-.789.027-.216.325-.437.893-.663 3.498-1.524 5.83-2.529 6.998-3.014 3.332-1.386 4.025-1.627           </svg>\n              )},\n            ].map((opt) => (\n              <button\n                key={opt.value}\n                type=\"button\"\n                role=\"radio\"\n                aria-checked={platformPreference === opt.value}\n                onClick={() => setPlatformPreference(opt.value)}\n                className=\"flex-1 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold transition-colors cursor-pointer\"\n                style={{\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  display: \"flex\",\n                  alignItems: \"center\",\n                  justifyContent: \"center\",\n                  gap: \"0.4rem\",\n                  backgroundColor:\n                    platformPreference === opt.value\n                      ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"transparent\",\n                  color:\n                    platformPreference === opt.value\n                      ? \"white\"\n                      : \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  border:\n                    platformPreference === opt.value\n                      ? \"1.5px solid var(--color-accent)\"\n                      : \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                }}\n              >\n                {opt.icon}\n                {opt.label}\n              </button>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div\n          className=\"flex items-start gap-3 p-4 rounded-lg cursor-pointer\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: requiresApproval\n              ? \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.06)\"\n              : \"transparent\",\n            border: requiresApproval\n              ? \"1.5px solid var(--color-accent)\"\n              : \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n          }}\n          role=\"checkbox\"\n          aria-checked={requiresApproval}\n          aria-label=\"Require approval for new members\"\n          tabIndex={0}\n          onClick={() => setRequiresApproval(!requiresApproval)}\n          onKeyDown={(e) => {\n            if (e.key === \" \" || e.key === \"Enter\") {\n              e.preventDefault();\n              setRequiresApproval(!requiresApproval);\n            }\n          }}\n        >\n          <div\n            className=\"w-5 h-5 rounded flex items-center justify-center mt-0.5\"\n            style={{\n              flexShrink: 0,\n              backgroundColor: requiresApproval\n                ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                : \"transparent\",\n              border: requiresApproval\n                ? \"none\"\n                : \"2px solid var(--color-border)\",\n            }}\n          >\n            {requiresApproval && (\n              <svg width=\"12\" height=\"12\" viewBox=\"0 0 12 12\" fill=\"white\">\n                <path d=\"M10 3L4.5 8.5L2 6\" stroke=\"white\" strokeWidth=\"2\" fill=\"none\" strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\"/>\n              </svg>\n            )}\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <div\n              className=\"text-sm font-semibold\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              Require approval for new members\n            </div>\n            <div\n              className=\"text-xs mt-0.5\"\n              style={{\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Members must be approved by you before joining the group.\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex gap-3\">\n          <button\n            type=\"button\"\n            className=\"flex-1 py-2.5 px-4 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold cursor-pointer\"\n            style={{\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              border: \"1.5px solid var(--color-border)\",\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              backgroundColor: \"transparent\",\n            }}\n            onClick={() => router.push(`/listings/${id}`)}\n          >\n            Cancel\n          </button>\n          <button\n            type=\"submit\"\n            className=\"btn-primary flex-1\"\n            disabled={loading}\n          >\n            {loading ? \"Saving...\" : \"Save changes\"}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </form>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":123,"oldLines":6,"newStart":123,"newLines":32,"lines":["     (n) => n >= \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",","+            color: \"var(--color-error)\",","+            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",","+          }}","+          role=\"alert\"","+        >","+
